iet_response.group_framing: The video title and on-screen text use derogatory labels targeting a person (e.g., “老鸨…皮条莉…老瘦马…丑逼”), positioning the targeted individual as an outgroup (“them”) defined by perceived sexual immorality/low status and ugliness. No clear protected ingroup (“us”) is explicitly defined; however, the framing implies a moral majority/normal viewers as the implicit ingroup by contrast with the insulted target.
iet_response.appraisal_evidence: The outgroup is portrayed as engaging in degrading/immoral behavior (implied by terms like “老鸨” and “皮条”/“瘦马,” commonly used as sex-work/trafficking-related slurs) and as socially contemptible (“丑逼”). Title: 看破鞋知标准
Transcript: Yeah.🎼如果你有一双只练芭蕾的软鞋的话，我就可以通过磨损程度来判断你基本功到底练的好不好。如果你的大拇指内侧出现磨损的话，说明同学你近期转圈技巧没少练。如果你的大拇指出现磨损的话，那么同学你要注意一下你的外开是不是特别的不好。如果你的中指和无名指处出现磨损的话，那么老师想对你说你练的非常的可以。如果你。小拇指的位置出现磨损的话，那么赶紧从最基础的练习开始，你可能后背的直立形态还是没有完全找对。

Title: 我又不是天生就花痴，谁叫他长得那么帅呢？
Transcript: 🎼我太生气了，竟然有人说我花痴，我就纳闷了，这能怪我吗？我又不是天生就花痴，谁叫他长那么帅呢？你死人不偿命啊。对要。😡你们的舒总顾总，我的心里各种走，我的心在哈尔滨怨了许久，盼了许久，等了许久，可怨可盼可等的人。🎼否则生命会像一口孤寂，你脑子里装的多是些什么呀？唉，没关系，我哭一个月就好了，兄弟们。😊

iet_response.emotion_inference: Anger (and mild contempt/hostility in tone) is invited toward the outgroup because the speaker says they are “太生气了” and reacts to being called “花痴,” treating it as unjust. The emotional focus is on interpersonal insult rather than group-based fear or disgust toward a protected class.

Title: 30秒教你读懂阴道镜报告！
Transcript: 慢性宫颈炎、鳞状上皮增生活跃，这个词是个什么意思呢？经常有的时候我们拿到阴道镜或者是追切的病理标本，就会有这么一个词的出现。大家注意，今天教大家看读一下这种病理的结果。如果结果提示上皮内流样病变啊。有的时候他会报一个高级别上皮内流样病变或者是低级别上皮内流样病变，这就要注意了，赶紧拿着报告去找你的医生，你需要下一步的处理。第二呢就是有可能会出现上皮内流样病变、一级、二级、三级这种字眼，如果出现它的话，那也非常的重要要去。一生而看。但除了这个之外，其他的比如说啊有什么化生啊、炎症啊、挖空细胞啊，或者是硬状上皮细胞增生活跃这种问题的话，那就都没有关系。这种都提示您目前还没有病变的发生。
Label: Normal

Title: 法国40响弹链手枪
Transcript: 。这是一支1870年的法国40响弹练手枪，在那个连自动手枪都还没发明的年代，这么一款双动式加大弹容的手枪，简直就是火力小王子一般的存在。因为这把枪所采用的共弹原理是和自行车差不多的链条共弹。可以看到，这把枪的扳机组件。虽然以现在的眼光看起来很奇葩，但设计的很巧妙，这是个双动式扳机在扳机第一形成的时候，同时拉动机针后退带动转链枪管后退扣到底之后释放机针。😊？触发子弹底火40发的大容量精巧的双动式扳机可以半自动连续射击，不用抛弹壳装填方式虽然略奇葩，但在当时来说也算还行。所以他为啥后来没燃后了？因为这种6.5毫米子弹太弱鸡了，而制造成本也自然贵，最终这奇葩玩意产了百余只之后不了了之。😊
Label: Normal

Title: 贱人，胡说
Transcript: 🎼臣妾要告发熹贵妃司通，姐胡说臣妾要告发熹贵妃司通贿了后宫姐。胡说臣妾若有半句虚言，便将武雷轰顶，永不超生。臣妾要告发熹贵妃私通，惠乱后宫罪不容珠。姐胡说。😡

Title: 家有母夜叉，这下有好戏看了
Transcript: 🎼可这前夫人可不是好惹的，拿着扫帚就杀了过去。你这鬼哎哎命命。😡大哭大闹的把钱老板可折腾够呛，包老板才把事情的原委告诉钱夫人，钱夫人立即坏笑起来，跟着钱老板一起去追卖菜翁父女二人，留下包老板坐在原地，喘着粗气。这时候，卖菜翁妇女跑到一户空房子里，正好遇到济公在那里等着父女二人。随后，钱老板夫妇和包老板也追了上来，济公就又跟钱老板商量买瘤子的交易，你不是看着我他那个牛子了是啊，现在决定卖给你。🎼啊但是钱钱本利一概取消你外加他50千铜钱，你给50千，我外加20千也不定呢。😡要是你拿不下来呢。
Label: Offensive

iet_response.group_framing: The video does not clearly construct a stable identity-based ingroup/outgroup (e.g., ethnicity, religion, nationality). Instead, it frames groups as role-based characters in a conflict: the “us” side is the money boss and his wife (and later the scheming/justice figure), while the “them” side is the sellers/targets (the vegetable vendor father-daughter) and also the ex-wife as a separate antagonistic role. Markers are narrative roles and actions (chasing, bargaining, attacking with a broom), not inherent group traits.
iet_response.appraisal_evidence: The outgroup (targets being pursued and the ex-wife as an antagonist role) is portrayed as causing disruption and harm to the ingroup’s interests: the ex-wife “kills/attacks with a broom,” “cries and makes a scene,” and “tortures” the money boss; later, the father-daughter are pursued for a transaction involving a “瘤子” (tumor). The implied violation is interpersonal aggression and interference with property/affairs, plus threat to the ingroup’s stability and plans.
iet_response.emotion_inference: Anger and contempt are invited toward the antagonistic characters/roles (especially the ex-wife and the pursued targets) because the narration emphasizes violent intrusion (broom attack) and causing trouble, alongside a retaliatory/competitive pursuit and bargaining. iet_response.endorsement_stance: Endorse. The narrative tone supports the ingroup’s pursuit and confrontation (chasing the targets, negotiating under threat/pressure), and it frames the antagonists’ disruptive behavior as warranting counteraction. There is no clear opposition to the punitive/confrontational tendency.

Title: 一直被网友称做娘炮的鹿晗，究竟做错了什么？
Transcript: ？🎼一直被网友喷娘炮的鹿晗究竟是怎么回应的？在最顶名的时候，勇敢的宣布了与郭晓彤的恋情。这种有责任敢做敢当的男人。被网友说娘这期视频小编要大大的为鹿晗证明，鹿晗长得是眉清目秀，以至于帅都不能在他的身上，只能用漂亮好看等刺眼来形容他。可是人家这样天生的励志，又有啥办法呢？大家说说鹿晗除了长相外，做的哪件事和娘沾边了。他是归国四子中回来开始流量最大的。当初离队后，大家都说他是逃兵，可是鹿晗把该做的事情，自己应该承担的义务全部都完成了。回来后，无论是参加综艺还是拍电视剧。那资源都是一流的，没有错，他刚回来的时候，一些作品确实不如人意，可是大家是不是都忘记了，他是男团出身。本来演技就是有待提高的演技我们暂且不说，他在资源最好的时候公布恋情。要知道娱乐圈，一个偶像派明星公布恋情会损失多少的粉丝呀。可是他依然无所畏惧的公布了与郭晓彤的恋情，甚至将演唱会的安保人员都全部换成了女生，后来直接与顶级奢侈品解除了合作关系。这样一个有责任感，有担当，有主店的男明星一直被网友成为娘。我就想问问他除了长相外，其他哪里还娘。😊
Label: Normal

iet_response.appraisal_evidence: The outgroup is portrayed as attacking Lu Han with gendered insults (“娘炮”), and the harm implied is reputational/social degradation and unfair judgment of his character and career. The transcript also suggests the outgroup mischaracterizes his motives (e.g., “大家都说他是逃兵”) and unfairly critiques his work and relationships, implying a violation of fairness and respect rather than physical threat.

Title: 不做那个有毒的男宝妈，大部分妈妈都是这样的吗那姐姐们不是很惨
Transcript: 🎼Take有毒 He never thought that I would be that toxic boy mom He hits his sisters He punches them I'm like maybe he's having a hard day So when I think about my daughter's getting married, I get excited right, go at their dresses planning their weddings When I think about my son's wedding's I want to cry At last boy just it a little bit different Like there's something about him that makes me feel like I could leave my husband but it's all okay because I've got him.I'm sharing him with all my love that when he gets older, he went for me to leave home because who needs a lover when you've got a mother.😊

The outgroup is framed as “toxic boy moms”/“that toxic boy” (and by extension the abusive male partner/son dynamic), marked by labels like “有毒的男宝妈” and depictions of the boy hitting/punching his sisters, plus the idea that the son’s presence changes the mother’s emotional security.
iet_response.appraisal_evidence: The outgroup is portrayed as causing harm within the family: the boy “hits his sisters” and “punches them,” and the narrative implies ongoing emotional harm to the women (the mother feels she may need to leave her husband; the daughter’s marriage planning is contrasted with the son’s wedding making her want to cry). The implied violation is domestic violence/abuse and the resulting threat to daughters/sisters and to the mother’s wellbeing.

Fear is not strongly emphasized; the dominant invitation is moral condemnation of the harmful behavior and its impact on women and family safety.
iet_response.action_tendency: The video implies a collective response of exclusion/shaming of the “toxic boy mom” framing (i.e., not doing/avoiding that type), rather than direct physical attack. The title and framing suggest rejecting the harmful dynamic and aligning with “most mothers” who are not toxic.
iet_response.endorsement_stance: The video endorses the action tendency to exclude/shame the “toxic boy mom”/toxic dynamic. Signals include the explicit directive in the title (“不做那个有毒的男宝妈”) and the contrastive narrative that validates the protective, non-toxic mother/sister perspective while portraying the outgroup as harmful.

Title: 黄芪配一物，阴茎海绵体的充气筒
Transcript: 🎼 大家都知道，黄芪呢就有补气之王的美誉，很多人呢用它来泡水喝，包括我自己呢也经常用它泡水喝。但是很多男同胞啊都不知道黄芪这样搭配，不但有气血双补的作用，还可以啊帮助阴茎血液啊，更流畅，补杞更加自在，可以浑身充满电，而且可以双击一下，收藏起来。我现在呢就把这个盆管用的补肾小房子呢分享给大家，有需要的可以试一试，再出黄芪1克不煮克，一起补水喝，每天不要喝太多。只需两小会就可以了，煎持个10天半月。🎼依旧会感觉自己全身的力气源源不断。很多用过的粉丝朋友都跟我反馈说，确是不错。如果你不确定自己适不适合，你可以给我点个免费的小红心和关注。在我的评论区打个6我，帮你辩证一下。

The tone (“傻屌” title, teasing lines about losing, boasting “榜一”) encourages ridicule and status-based disdain rather than fear or empathy.

Title: 婚后还在手淫，这正常吗？
Transcript: 🎼 婚后还在手淫，这正常吗？许多人觉得有了固定的性伴侣，那么就不会存在着手淫这么一说。其实不然，很多时候手淫不只是年轻时候的一种能量的释放方法，结婚以后就不需要了，其实啊并非如此。虽然说男性婚后可以适当的手淫，但是家庭是两个人的事情，而性生活也必须在双方之间有一定的规律存在。如果一味的去回避妻子。🎼同时，让自己对妻子的欲望逐步降低的话，那么感情最容易出现问题，家庭也容易不和谐。

It does not clearly construct a racial/ethnic/religious outgroup. However, it implicitly positions an outgroup as people who “回避妻子” or “让自己对妻子的欲望逐步降低” (i.e., spouses who avoid sexual communication/affection), and also those who hold the belief that marriage eliminates masturbation (“许多人觉得有了固定的性伴侣，那么就不会存在着手淫”).

The outgroup’s behavior is characterized as avoidance/withdrawal rather than any protected-class wrongdoing. No threat of violence or dehumanization is shown.

There is no clear invitation to anger, disgust, contempt, or fear toward a protected outgroup; the tone is corrective/educational about what is “normal” and what maintains harmony.

Title: 什么是反荡妇防卫机制
Transcript: 什么是反荡妇防卫机制呢？荡妇这个词是女性发明出来攻击同类的男性根本就不会在乎这个女的当不当，他只会关心你长得漂不漂亮，当不当我。所以男生在搭讪女生的时候，要注意她的闺蜜有没有在场。如果她的闺蜜在场的话，你所要联系方式，大概率是会被拒绝的，并不是说她不想给你，而是说今天这个事情要被她闺蜜大嘴巴说出去啊，她的人设就崩塌了。还有你约一个女生去开房，她大概率会拒绝你的，并不是说因为她不想跟你去，而是她不。😡想让你感觉他是一个随便的人。那么如果你告诉他对面有一个影咖，里面有你喜欢看的电影，我们要不要去吹个空调，喝杯咖啡，顺便聊聊人生呢？要是他喜欢你的话，大概率会同意的。就算最后发生了什么，也是你的责任。
Label: Offensive

iet_response.group_framing: The video positions an implicit 'us' as men (and by extension male viewers) who are supposedly targeted or disadvantaged in dating/sexual contexts. The 'them' is women, especially framed through the term '反荡妇防卫机制' and the repeated focus on '闺蜜' (female friends) and '女生' (women) as gatekeepers who allegedly judge, expose, or reject men. Markers: gendered language ('男生/男的', '女生/女人', '闺蜜', '她'), and the concept of '荡妇' as a label used to police women’s sexual reputation, while the transcript claims women (and their networks) act to harm men’s romantic/sexual attempts.
iet_response.appraisal_evidence: The outgroup (women/female networks) is portrayed as: (1) rejecting men’s requests for contact when a female friend is present, allegedly to protect or maintain social reputation; (2) refusing sexual/romantic invitations (e.g., '开房') not because of disinterest but to avoid being seen as '随便' and to make the man feel she is '随便'; (3) potentially '大嘴巴' spreading information that would '崩塌' a man’s or a woman’s '人设' (reputation/persona). The implied harm/threat is reputational and relational: women are depicted as controlling access and using social exposure to undermine men’s intentions and outcomes. The transcript also includes a claim that if sex happens, '也是你的责任' (placing responsibility on the man), reinforcing a power imbalance and blame dynamic.
iet_response.emotion_inference: The viewer is invited to feel anger and contempt toward women as a group (and toward female friends as enforcers), because the appraisal attributes coordinated gatekeeping and reputational sabotage to women. The emotional cues include the use of a derogatory/loaded framing ('荡妇') and the narrative that women’s behavior is strategic and harmful to men’s dating/sexual goals. Disgust is not explicit, but anger/contempt are strongly suggested by the accusatory framing.
iet_response.action_tendency: The video implies a strategic collective response: men should adjust dating tactics based on whether a woman’s '闺蜜' is present, and should use alternative conversation/interaction framing (e.g., suggesting a more 'serious' date like movies/coffee and '吹个空调') to increase acceptance. It also implies shifting blame/responsibility expectations ('就算最后发生了什么，也是你的责任'), which can function as a justification for men’s approach rather than a call to empathy. Overall response is not 'attack' or 'punish' directly, but it endorses manipulation/strategic avoidance of female social scrutiny.
iet_response.endorsement_stance: Endorses the action tendency. Signals: the transcript provides prescriptive advice ('要注意...闺蜜有没有在场', '如果...大概率是会被拒绝', '如果你告诉他...我们要不要去...') and frames these tactics as effective and necessary. It does not oppose the strategy; it presents it as correct guidance for male viewers.

Title: 怎样才能让阴茎勃起自如呢？
Transcript: 嗯。🎼怎样才能让阴茎勃起自如方法很简单？中医讲的肝主出血，肝的疏泄功能正常，气肌畅达，经脉通利，东筋得以润养，那么阴茎才能够勃起更有利。想要疏肝解瘀。今天呢给大家教一个小妙招，右手的第四五掌骨之间是我们肝脏的反射区，我们可以从手腕的方向，向手指的方向稍微用力去推，每天两次，每次60到90下。这个方法呢作为日常的保健可以起到疏肝理气，对于肝淤。输引起的阴茎、微软不起、硬度差、焦虑抑郁等有一定的帮助。我是泌尿男科医生吴亚冰，我的主页呢还有许多关于阳痿早泄的科普。如果觉得对你有帮助，大家可以点一颗免费的小红心。
Label: Normal

Title: 这是无意识的厌女
Transcript: 🎼刷到这句话，才发现这原来是吴意识的燕女啊，很多小说写女主受苦受难，却没有让她成长，而是为了赐予她一个男人，这就是燕女，明明女性也可以独立成长，不需要依附男性。凭什么对男主不忠不爱的惩罚是女主死。凭什么女配就要暗恋18年，男平文可以打怪升级，一堆后宫，女平文就得是复仇后，遇见更强的男主，还有女主家里有钱大小姐后期设定一定有家道中落，男主相救，无一不透露着吴意识燕女。😊
Label: Normal

iet_response.group_framing: The ingroup is framed as women (and by extension viewers who support women’s independence and gender equality). The outgroup is framed as misogynistic narratives/“male-centered” storytelling and the implied patriarchal ideology behind them (e.g., “无意识的厌女/厌女倾向,” “为了赐予她一个男人,” “男主相救,” “女配暗恋18年,” “女平文就得复仇后遇见更强的男主”). Markers: repeated claims that women are depicted as suffering without growth, needing male attachment, and being punished for not loving/being unfaithful; contrast with male protagonists being allowed to progress (“打怪升级”“后宫”).
iet_response.appraisal_evidence: The outgroup is portrayed as restricting women’s agency and development: female leads are made to “受苦受难” without “成长,” stories push women to depend on men (“为了赐予她一个男人”“不需要依附男性” as a corrective claim). It also implies unfair moral punishment and double standards: “对男主不忠不爱的惩罚是女主死,” and “女配就要暗恋18年” while male characters get more freedom/advancement (“男平文可以打怪升级，一堆后宫”). The implied violation is gender-based unfairness and dehumanization of women’s autonomy.
iet_response.emotion_inference: Anger (and likely contempt) is invited. The appraisal highlights systemic unfairness and demeaning portrayals of women (women’s independence denied; women punished for choices; male characters rewarded). The viewer is positioned to feel indignation at misogynistic tropes and double standards.

iet_response.endorsement_stance: Endorse. The video explicitly argues against misogynistic framing and calls for recognition of women’s independent growth, using rhetorical questions and critique of narrative double standards as signals of opposition to the implied action tendency (reject/condemn misogynistic storytelling).

Title: 中国男性，阴茎需要多长
Transcript: 🎼女性平均阴道长度7到12厘米，因为富有弹性可以延长到16厘米，过长，不仅不会让伴侣觉得舒服，相反，还会产生疼痛和伤害，甚至引发阴道撕裂大出血。而且女性的阴道神经末梢几乎在外3分之1。我国男性的勃起长度一般在10到13厘米，平均12厘米。所以只要达到平均水平，一般都可以满足正常的夫妻生活。
Label: Normal

iet_response.group_framing: The video frames an ingroup as heterosexual couples/“normal” partners engaging in “normal夫妻生活,” implicitly including both men and women as a shared in-group. It does not construct a distinct outgroup (no ethnicity, religion, or other protected class is targeted). However, it implicitly positions “too-long” penis size as a problematic category relative to the “average/normal” category, rather than an outgroup of people.
iet_response.appraisal_evidence: It claims that if a male’s erect penis is “too long,” it will not make the partner comfortable and instead causes pain, injury, and even vaginal tearing with heavy bleeding. It also asserts that women’s vaginal nerve endings are mostly in the outer third, implying that excessive length violates comfort/safety and leads to physical harm to the partner.
iet_response.emotion_inference: The viewer is invited to feel concern/negative evaluation toward “too-long” penis size (not toward a protected outgroup). Title: 房事达到30分钟 阴茎硬如铁
Transcript: .你想不想房事达到30分钟，硬度持久还坚挺这个小技巧送给你他是我从医30多年延时增硬的经验方，祝你恢复持久性，找回男人的自信。时间短，硬度差，龟头敏感，中途疲软刷到这条视频，你的苦日子熬到头了。从今天开始，你再也不用为因为早泄而焦虑，他是可以调理治疗的。今天我就把这个延长时间增强。硬度方法分享出来。如果你愿意交我这个医生朋友，可以点一个免费的小红心加关注。我是北京公立医院的李继涛医生，只要你是我的粉丝，在我的评论区里打个数字7，我把这个方法单独发你一份，请你注意查收。

Title: 怎么增大睾丸可以通过两方面来改善
Transcript: 🎼怎么增大睾丸可以通过两方面来改善。第一，口服药物。睾丸啊是男性的重要生殖器官，具有产生精子以及分泌雄激素的效果。成年人睾丸发育停止后啊，通常不会继续增大。但是儿童睾丸会随着生长发育而增大，但是睾丸小于同龄的儿童，多数是由于体内缺乏雄激素导致的，可以遵从医生指导，通过服用十1睾酮来补充体内的雄激素，有利于促进的睾丸的发育，使睾。丸增大。第二呢，加强体育锻炼。如果想要睾丸增大呢，可以通过增强体育锻炼的方式来改善，加强体育锻炼，有利于睾丸内的血液畅通，从而能够帮助睾丸的体积啊增大。

Title: 说了那么多，原来你叫二奶？
Transcript: 🎼你要干什么，我也不知道我要干什么，我要打时工，你过来呀，动作快点，别耽误大伙时间。原来你这么能打呀，你到底什么人呢？你。你马上就知道炫丑，现在知道我是干什么的了吧。可我我这知道不知道的，我知知不道。严格的说，其实你应该管我叫安奶。😡🎼

Title: 长舌妇之相，虚伪不真诚 !
Transcript: 左角位置有皱纹的女人，代表着一生都是孤骨之象，男人没有能力，就要靠自己劳碌一生，偶尔能有小孩进账，但也会在不知不觉中划出句。运势不佳，财富守不住，眼缘也不好。M如果是嘴唇上都是小皱纹的女人。这是标准的长舌腹之象，虚伪不真整。
Label: Offensive

The ingroup (us) is not explicitly defined as a protected or cohesive group; it is implied as those who are not characterized by these traits (i.e., “normal/acceptable” women) and by extension the audience/men who are not subject to the described negative fate. Markers defining them: specific physical/physiognomic features (wrinkles at mouth corners/lips) and the associated label "长舌妇"; additional marker is the claim of being "虚伪不真诚".
iet_response.appraisal_evidence: The outgroup is portrayed as having a lifelong negative destiny and character flaws: men "没有能力" must rely on themselves; the woman’s luck is "不佳"; wealth "守不住"; "眼缘也不好"; and the woman is described as "虚伪不真整" (hypocritical/insincere). The implied harm/violation is social and relational: the woman is framed as untrustworthy and damaging to others’ well-being (financial instability, poor interpersonal “eye match,” and dishonesty). There is no explicit physical threat, but there is reputational degradation and moral condemnation.
iet_response.emotion_inference: The viewer is invited to feel contempt/disgust toward the labeled women. This is driven by the physiognomy-based moral judgment (“虚伪不真诚/虚伪不真整”) and the negative life-outcome claims (bad luck, inability to keep wealth, bad “eye” compatibility). The framing suggests the outgroup is inherently flawed and untrustworthy, which typically elicits contempt/disgust rather than fear.

It does not clearly endorse violence or punishment; the dominant implied response is social rejection/exclusion (exclude/shun).
iet_response.endorsement_stance: The video endorses the exclusionary tendency (endorse). Signals: it repeatedly labels the outgroup with a derogatory stereotype (“长舌妇”) and asserts moral untrustworthiness (“虚伪不真诚/虚伪不真整”) alongside negative relational/financial outcomes, which supports distancing rather than defending or neutralizing the group.

Title: 19岁机车小伙车祸后下体勃起十余天，医生:男生要特别注意骑跨伤
Transcript: 🎼 这是一个男性19岁，爱骑摩托车，他和一个汽车内发生了一个碰撞，当时个夏季就有点淤青，然后呢尿道会有点溢血，给他做了个简单的处理，然后呢放了流置的尿管。尿管放进去以后，他的这个尿血也好了。但是呢过了一周以后，尿管拔了以后，这时候他发现这个一直属于活际状态，而且逐渐出现一个阴茎的胀痛不适，失续了有个传膜10天左右就来到了我们医院。那么这个小伙子呢他就属于种动脉性传膜器，先给他包治疗。那包治疗呢可能有。🎼隔一天多效果呢不是很明显，还是处于不弈状态。后来呢决定还是觉择这个介入治疗进行了一个高血性的双侧栓塞。测作完以后，它这效果是立竿见影的，已经出院。所以说呢对于这种器官伤，我们男性同胞啊一定要注意，因为它是比较脆弱的器官，如果一旦有问题，要及时就医。

Title: 男人洗澡的时候，可以多摸一摸睾丸
Transcript: 🎼.男人洗澡的时候可以多摸一摸睾丸，这样能及时发现一些问题。第一，可以看看睾丸的大小、高低是否一致，再看看皮肤有没有红肿溃烂的情况。第二，可以摸一摸，看看有没有明显的不适感。第三，可以捏一，看有没有肿块和硬块。如果捏到有凌晨麻花状的结块，并且睾丸发育疼痛胀感，这样可能是金属性。局长建议到医院进一步检查。

Transcript: 正常成年男性在性活动或持续性刺激下，阴茎勃起能持续数分钟甚至1小时以上。若在非上状态下，阴茎勃起持续超过4小时，医学上称为阴茎异常勃起。🎼其病因包括外伤、高度饮酒、暴力行为、血液疾病、轴瘤区范、手术损伤等等，特别是异常勃起超过6小时就会有阴茎坏死的风险，所以及时就医为上策，以免造成更大的终身伤害。

Title: 又一个公主病，还叫草莓公主
Transcript: 我是新来的草莓公主，你们都要听我的，听到了没有？切仆人过来，公主，我来了。你怎么来那么慢？对不起对不起对不起，看你下次还敢不敢，这就是你们的下场。你还等于我火好了，散会。😊快手拥抱每一种生活。

Title: 给怀孕母牛洗胃
Transcript: 🎼震惊怀孕母牛险些被6名大汉灌晕，从白天灌到晚上，无人问津，到底是病毒的入侵还是扭曲的人心。敬请收看本期走进科学。龙兽医和我心连心，我和龙兽医玩脑筋。哎，其实就是老牛吃了30斤玉米粉，小命险些被夺走。于是我果断撸起袖口，给牛洗胃，咱可是高手，踩上凳子有1米9，拿起水桶在一身吼，一桶下肚抖一抖，两桶下肚走一抖，三桶下肚，他倒胃口，四桶下肚浑身发抖。养牛虎心疼到大喊助手。我说。咱是在洗胃，又不是在灌酒，最后玉米面被水成功冲走，养牛户对龙叔是赞不绝口，但我帮忙的费用得结完再走。海水最多收你7900。但看你和龙叔是好友，那咱就把零头一抹给个八00就妥。养牛户听后骂我敲诈勒索。我说兄弟，别怕，把你的手机给我。

Title: 警方通报女子被当街强奸：系夫妻肢体冲突，造谣者被带回调查
Transcript: 🎼南宁市武鸣警方通报女子被当街强奸，近日，网络流传武鸣区一女子被当街强奸的视频信息，某分局高度重视，迅速开展核查。经查，2023年6月5日35时分许，在武鸣区东明路某手机专卖店门前，男子韦某某与其妻子李某某争吵后发生肢体冲突，随后两人一同返回家中。该过程被人拍摄发至微信群后，被他人约到武鸣区一女子被当街强奸不时信息发布上网。目前，警方已依法对韦某某夫妇纠纷进行调处。涉嫌。编造虚假信息的陆某某等人已被带回公安机关调查处理。警方提醒，网络不是法外之地，制造虚假信息，传播有害信息依法将受到惩处。希望广大网民不信谣、不传谣，共同维护良好的网络秩序。😊

Title: 遇见4个母夜叉
Transcript: 兄弟们，今天出两件大事，气死我了，看等我买了一车哥伦比亚了吧，我准备去芝加哥途经这个奥特莱斯，我就进去了，买了这么多的哥伦比亚结账的时候呢，我付现金，他说他没有零钱，他找不了我，要我刷卡，我说我卡里没钱，我只付现金，要不然我不买了，四个大老娘们瞪着我给我堵那地方了，说L kiding me，你在耍我吗？我耍你老舅，我我怎么的付现金也不行吗？后来旁边有个白人的贵妇啊，就给我说两句好话啊，这事就。拉倒了。第二件事不回到车上了吗？我拿第二趟，因为太多了，装满满凳登的这地方呢就有一个人给他系鞋带。我关上车门之后，我就来个性感的锁车，这声呢确实有点大，大家挺一停啊。就给蹲着这人那下狱拘令，然后你要我来了，说你为什么吓唬我，我都蒙圈了，我锁车也就吓唬他。这老美有的时候不是误。😡
Label: Offensive

iet_response.appraisal_evidence: The outgroup (the four women) is portrayed as physically blocking the speaker at the store/checkout area and questioning/accusing them of “耍我/你在耍我吗？” after the speaker insists on paying cash. This implies a violation of fairness and respect in commerce (refusing the speaker’s payment method, attempting to trap/harass them). In the second incident, an “American” is implied to be confused or alarmed by the speaker’s loud car-locking sound, leading to a “蹲着这人那下狱拘令” (a legal/punitive response is referenced), suggesting perceived overreaction or unjust treatment by authorities/US context.

The overall response endorsed is confrontational resistance rather than de-escalation.

No protected class (race, ethnicity, nationality, religion) is explicitly referenced; the division is moral/sexual-status based.
iet_response.appraisal_evidence: The outgroup (“破鞋” woman) is portrayed as having committed sexual betrayal/infidelity (“偷了汉,” “破鞋者”), and as violating norms of fidelity and respectability. Fear is not central; anger is secondary to contempt/disgust.

It does not endorse physical violence explicitly, but it endorses degrading punishment and social ostracism.

Title: 这算不算违背妇女意愿？
Transcript: ，姐真不行，姐你今晚陪我，你今晚陪我不，今晚陪我，我真的不是这种人。姐算了算了，我再加2万姐姐再加2万。

iet_response.appraisal_evidence: The transcript implies a consent/pressure dynamic: the woman says she is “not like that” and refuses (“真不行…我真的不是这种人”), while the other party persists and offers money (“再加2万”). The implied violation is coercion or attempting to override the woman’s will via financial inducement, i.e., a consent boundary being disrespected.

iet_response.action_tendency: The video implies a protective/denying response: the woman should not comply with the request and the coercive attempt should be rejected. No explicit collective punishment or attack is shown or endorsed.
iet_response.endorsement_stance: Oppose (the coercive action tendency). Signals include the woman’s repeated refusal, the framing question in the title about violating women’s will, and the lack of any endorsement of compliance or retaliation—only rejection of the pressure.

This corresponds to an “exclude/shield” tendency (prevent exposure to the attractive version), not punishment or attack.
iet_response.endorsement_stance: The video endorses the action tendency (endorse). Signals: the title explicitly states the purpose (“为了防止…”) and the premise that textbooks should show the men’s older selves to prevent girls from becoming infatuated.

Title: 舔狗逆天改命？爆改逆袭？变身小白脸？
Transcript: 🎼我愿称之为全狗的绝地反击，你永远想象不到男生为了逆袭有多疯狂。救命啊，你们男生为了变帅都这么拼的吗？刚刷到一个小哥哥，因为皮肤差又有点黑，将近被锯了十几次，自称全狗里的长青树交给一个丙梁度。后来他在朋友的鼓励下去医院治了皮肤，在白大怪的推荐下开是内福美白完。本来他是对护肤品失望过的，更不愿相信内服刚开始吃的前几天确实没什么变化。不过为了变白，他还是坚持在吃，于是他早睡不熬夜吃，坚持每天运动锻炼吃，还日常学习穿搭，认真打理自己，坚持了一个月。我胖老公的变白很多，已经前面的。同个人吗？果然，白不仅是大美女的基本盘，也是大帅哥的基本盘呀。小哥把自己爆炸后的照片发到了朋友圈，果然之前的三身就上来找他了。于是看见了是这样。😊
Label: Normal

The outgroup is not a protected class; it is framed as “全狗/舔狗” (a derogatory label for people who chase others excessively) and also implicitly “皮肤差又有点黑/之前的自己” as a negative prior state. Markers: ingroup is self-improvement, discipline, and attractiveness; outgroup is being a “舔狗/全狗” and having undesirable appearance/previous failure.
iet_response.appraisal_evidence: The outgroup is portrayed as causing harm mainly through social/romantic dynamics and self-image degradation: “因为皮肤差又有点黑…将近被锯了十几次” (mocking/harsh treatment in the narrative), and “果然之前的三身就上来找他了” (implying prior neglect/derision followed by opportunistic attention). No explicit physical violence by a group is shown; the implied violation is social humiliation and being judged/treated poorly due to appearance and prior behavior (“舔狗” label).
iet_response.emotion_inference: The viewer is invited to feel contempt/disgust toward the “舔狗/全狗” mindset and toward the earlier negative state (being judged, failing to improve), while also inviting admiration/relief toward the ingroup’s transformation. Overall group-based emotion is primarily contempt/disgust toward the outgroup label and prior behavior, not fear.
iet_response.action_tendency: The video endorses a collective response of self-improvement and “逆袭” (discipline in skincare/diet/sleep/exercise/styling). It does not endorse attacking or punishing others; it implies leaving behind the “舔狗/失败” identity and adopting the ingroup’s makeover routine.
iet_response.endorsement_stance: Endorse. The narrative repeatedly praises persistence (“坚持了一个月”), frames the transformation as successful, and treats the outgroup label as something to outgrow rather than retaliate against. Signals: positive framing of the makeover process and success outcomes; negative framing of “舔狗/全狗” as a prior, undesirable state.

Title: 睾丸扭转发生的诱发因素！
Transcript: 。🎼很多家长朋友很关心睾丸扭转的诱发因素有哪些？我们知道睾丸是运动的，它在阴囊内是前后左右呃上下是不断的变化的，也是不断的在一定范围内是收缩的，有利于睾丸的发育，并且有利于精子的生成。但是如果说在。🎼解剖发育异常，比如说精索偏长，窍膜发育异常，或者是引起睾丸的底下一个袋子，我们叫睾丸引袋，它的发育异常可以理解为就是先天性因素而导致的睾丸那。う。🎼另外还有深睡眠、剧烈运动或者是阴囊的外伤，或者是气温下降、低体温，或者是给孩子穿的内裤比较紧，这些也都可以诱发睾丸扭转的发生。

Title: 男人阴茎多长才算正常呢
Transcript: 🎼正常男性阴茎多长算正常呢？正常女性阴道的平均长度是7到12厘米，受潮受刺激的时候呢会延伸到16厘米。如果男性太长，反而会造成疼痛，不适的感觉，甚至呢还会出现阴道撕裂，大出血，女性阴道最敏感的神经末梢几乎都分布在靠外的3分之1处，我国男性平均勃起长度是12厘米。所以呢一味的追求长度，其实没啥意义，只要达到平均水平就可以了。对于女性而言呢，一次买。的身体互动，硬度的要求高于长度，你知道了吗？

Transcript: 🎼아.他现在是7岁，6岁的时候发现自己摸着左胸乳头后方有一个小的一个结节，摸起来也比较疼。我们查体的话，发现左侧的乳房乳头后方有一块2厘米左右，圆盘状的一个腺体，它这个是增厚了1个724毫米确诊的乳房早发育。这女孩其实也不胖，可以买一些零食呀，熬后呀、炸鸡块呀，像这种奶茶呀，但是主主食开是贩出的比较少一点，不想大激素发育的，这让他从饮食上来助理。后期的这个1到2年慢慢就会变软会消失。家长呢在家里面有小女孩在六七岁如。🎼如果说是查到自己乳乳房那个有硬块，或者说疼痛，要及时的在医院里面找专科的医生来就诊一下，孩子小少吃零食。

Transcript: 🎼谁敢相信曾经的三料事后，马苏竟沦为过街老鼠，人人喊打，这一切都源于她的好闺蜜李小璐做头发事件。当初李小璐出轨被曝光，马苏第一时间出来帮忙澄清。然而，后来事实证据摆在眼前。马苏成了跳梁小丑，不仅如此，撒谎成性的马苏还被爆料式圈内劳鸨，经常给其他女星拉关系，虽没有实锤，但网友根据马苏的一些辉煌过往，对此话也深信不疑。当初马苏得知闺蜜男友范金涛是富二代，便撬了闺蜜。墙角后来拍戏期间更是绯闻不断，还被拍到曾在夜店和男黑人热舞。曾经风光无限的马苏终为自己的不可一世付出了代价。你们认为马苏怎么样？

Title: 宫颈有病变，要做阴超还是阴道镜？
Transcript: 그.大家好，我是恩哥，一名妇产科医生。今天有一位粉丝咨询说宫颈上有点小毛病，我了解病情之后，建议他进一步做个阴道镜评估。他说我做过啦，然后贴了一张阴超报告给我，我哭笑不得。阴道镜跟阴超完全两个东西，不是一回事。阴道镜类似一个放大镜的装置。如果阴道壁或者宫颈表面怀疑有病变，可以在阴道镜的帮助下，找到可疑的点，然后取活组织送病理检查，但是他看不了子宫卵巢里面的问题。而阴超有这个功能，阴超是经阴道。做的B超，所以简称阴超，可以看到子宫宫腔内膜卵巢有什么结构异常或者肿块，宫颈上的肿块或者囊肿、阴道壁的囊肿也一样看得出，但是他恰恰看不了阴道壁跟宫颈表面的问题。更多妇产科知识，欢迎关注恩哥聊健康，谢谢大家。
Label: Normal

The outgroup ('them') is the fan/patient who is confused and relies on the wrong test image/report—marked by the claim that the patient "贴了一张阴超报告" and the doctor says "我哭笑不得" and that the patient misunderstands what each test can/can't see.
iet_response.appraisal_evidence: The outgroup is portrayed as misunderstanding medical procedures and using an inappropriate assessment tool (using ultrasound report when colposcopy is needed). The implied harm is diagnostic/clinical risk: missing or failing to evaluate suspicious cervical/vaginal surface lesions because ultrasound "看不了阴道壁跟宫颈表面的问题," which could delay proper biopsy/pathology evaluation.
iet_response.emotion_inference: none. Although the doctor expresses mild amusement/irritation ("我哭笑不得"), the appraisal is not directed at an identity group; it is a corrective, educational framing about medical accuracy. The viewer is invited to feel concern for correct diagnosis rather than anger/disgust/contempt/fear toward a group.

Title: 男人手淫对身体有害吗？多长时间一次才合适
Transcript: Yeah。手淫还是前列腺炎的专凶，因为很多男性呢一旦喜欢上手淫之后，就会无节制的开始手淫。手淫时间长了呢，会造成前列腺长期充血的状态，并且呢会出现遗精以及免疫力下降的可能，并且呢还会使人精神萎一的影响工作与学习，所以手淫对身体的危害是非常大的。如果前列腺炎持续充血，就会造成血管的淤堵，细菌会在局部的地方停留很长时间，所以就出现了前列腺炎这个疾病。前列腺中的动脉血管呢血液比较丰富，并且流通速度比较快，反而静脉血管中的回流阻力呢比较大。如果平时前列腺炎发生充血的症状，会导致静脉血管回流的阻力加大，从而会导致过分炎症的生成。所以平时呢应该改变生活中的一些坏习惯，减少前列腺充血的症状。如果你想了解更多哪性健康知识，欢迎添加我的微信进行咨询。
Label: Normal

Transcript: Yeah.手淫过度易冲极限，石榴皮外洗，52岁的陈先生找到我说，没想到这个岁数还能延长这么长时间，现在硬度也能跟20岁差不多了，真的太感谢了。我也由衷的感到高兴，今天就给公布出来，希望更多的患者受益。如果你也有年轻，用手过度时间一分钟了。硬度向海绵小便黄，大便粘舌苔厚腻，口干口苦口臭的问题，试试这个方法，用石榴皮捂被子，细心煎水，同房之前清洗龟头，1至2分钟。😊十次为一个疗程，我是男科段雪光，临床30多年，根据老祖宗留下来的经典秘方，他总结出几个岩石的方子，辩证使用后效果都不错。如果你想试试留言发个数字6，看到就发给你。😡

Title: 公交车小孩被打事件
Transcript: .一名21岁的男子在四川遂宁的一辆公交车上殴打一名7岁男孩。监控显示，当时男孩在车上顽皮蹦跳，用脚击了对面座位上男子的手。结果，该男子将男童狠摔在地上，并用脚踩踏男童头部。司机见状停车与乘客一起将打人男子控制，经医院诊断，男孩除了面部软组织肿胀，其余并无大碍。警方根据治安管理处罚法相关规定，决定对打人男子治安。拘留15天，并处。

Title: 雄蛇有两根半阴茎，而且可以轮流使用
Transcript: 🎼一小卒知识，熊蛇有两根半银茎交替使用，不仅仅是蛇类、鲨鱼、蜥蜴都有这样的构造，而且这个钉钉还是带刺的，每一根钉钉都可以单独使用，每次交配时只使用其中一根半银茎平时收缩在熊蛇尾基部，交配时会充穴外翻。如果你慢慢反向挤压一条熊舌的尾基部，也许就能看到，这也是很多雄蛇的尾部，为什么比刺蛇的尾部更粗一些的原因。蛇的交配过程很无聊。时间一般长达几个小时，甚至十来个小时，所以看蛇交配。会很累，很无聊，一点意思也没有。

Title: 又又又被强奸了，男朋友还在床上呼呼大睡！
Transcript: 🎼这个女人刚回家就看到闺蜜跟男友在一起荡秋千，看到女友的到来，男人显得有些慌张，而闺蜜却意犹未尽的说道，真羡慕女友这么强壮一个男朋友，这让男人有些不知所措，而女友非但没有生气，还因有这样一个男友感到自豪，但幸福的时光总是那么短，这天，因家里的电灯坏了，男友上去更换灯管，结果操作不大，灯管瞬间炸裂，男友当场倒闭。幸运的是，她没有被电死，但不幸的是，眼睛被玻璃残渣伤倒。在仓库上班的女友知道后，找老板请假回家，可老板已没有人手。我又拒绝请假。小美说，如果我的男友有生命危险，你可负不起责任，没想到老板起身说道，要请假可以，但必须把你身上最臭的裤裤扒给我。为了救自己的男友，小美只好照着我把裤裤取下来后，一把摔在老板的脸上。小美在手术室门口等着男友。这时一个老头走了出来，看着漂亮的小美，她好像有什么肮脏的。
Label: Hateful

iet_response.group_framing: The video frames an ingroup of the woman/“girlfriend” (and her romantic partner) as the primary moral center (“us”), marked by her being the protagonist and by sympathetic narration about her suffering and attempts to protect her boyfriend. An outgroup is positioned as the “boss/older man” and, more broadly, predatory/abusive men who exploit her vulnerability (“them”), marked by the narrative of coercion/sexual violence, the boss’s controlling demands, and the depiction of him as morally corrupt (e.g., “肮脏的”/dirty).
iet_response.appraisal_evidence: The outgroup (boss/older man and predatory male authority) is portrayed as violating the ingroup through coercion and sexual exploitation tied to employment power: the boss allegedly demands the woman remove her clothes (“把你身上最臭的裤裤扒给我”) as a condition for leave, and the transcript/title context implies sexual assault/rape. The harm implied includes sexual humiliation, coercive control, and physical injury risk (injury to the girlfriend’s eyes from the lamp incident is also present, but the most explicit violation is the boss’s coercive sexual demand).
iet_response.emotion_inference: The viewer is invited to feel anger and disgust toward the outgroup. Anger is prompted by the boss’s abuse of power and coercive sexual demand; disgust is prompted by the framing of the older man as “dirty” and by the sexualized humiliation described. Fear is not the dominant invitation; the emotional emphasis is moral revulsion and indignation.
iet_response.action_tendency: The video implies a punitive/retaliatory response against the outgroup rather than exclusion or mere reporting: the girlfriend is forced to comply, then she physically throws the removed item at the boss’s face (“一把摔在老板的脸上”). This suggests an endorsed reaction of humiliating or striking back at the abuser.
iet_response.endorsement_stance: The video appears to endorse the action tendency (punitive retaliation) in a limited, situational way: the physical act against the boss is presented as a necessary means to save the boyfriend and as a justified response to coercion. Signals include the narrative justification (“为了救自己的男友…只好照着…后，一把摔在老板的脸上”) and the lack of condemnation of the retaliation, instead portraying it as the only available countermeasure.

Title: 玩网红蹦床，女生下体撕裂2CM！！！
Transcript: 🎼怎么了？😊因为我知道我很痛嘛，然后他说是外阴出血2厘米，衣服也我感觉他粘性也不是很强，他肯定是衣因为衣服问题，质量的问题，然后到后面我自直接跳上去，结果没有抓牢，他就掉下来，掉下来以后然后直接走到了。🎼像他们玩的那个捏捏墙，它是属于自由性能，它不是属于一个高危险的像果好的它贴上去以后，不是像我们想象的是分开的，它是两个样子要拎到中间。你有没有大概算一下有多少钱，那起码要也要3000到3500这样子吧。啊，你你顾客提出我要355000或者是说多少金额，我马上就私掏腰包给你，这肯定是不现实的。我们这个场馆针对所有的顾客是有买一个平安保险的公众责任险，你要提供相应的这个证据票据过来，我们社会走流程给你报销的呀。

Title: 小仙女8大金句，男生遇见赶快跑
Transcript: 🎼女生PV男生哈最常用的8句话。第一，后面看你的表现。第二，我就是这个样子的人。3，你要是再这个样子，我心里面会默默给你扣分的。4、我完全可以找一个更好的。5、你有完没完。有这不是男生应该做的吗？7、有心者不用交哈，无心者交不会8，我当初是咋个瞎了眼把你看齐了。

The outgroup is “男生/男生” (men), marked by repeated “男生遇见赶快跑” and “男生应该做的吗？” and the repeated addressing of “你/男生” in the transcript.

Implied harms/violations include: men being “扣分” (silently penalized) for repeated undesirable behavior (“你要是再这个样子…”), men being treated as replaceable by women (“我完全可以找一个更好的”), men being pressured/criticized (“你有完没完”), and men being framed as the wrong choice in hindsight (“我当初是咋个瞎了眼把你看齐了”). iet_response.endorsement_stance: Endorse. The video’s comedic/teasing framing and the explicit directive in the title (“赶快跑”) signal approval of avoidance/exclusion as the recommended response to the outgroup’s behavior.

Title: 我说的vs我妈听到的
Transcript: 当我妈做饭不好吃时，我说的妈这菜做的稍微有那么一丁点咸，不过没事，我多吃点主食，多喝点水就好了。我妈听到的，嘿老太婆，你这饭是给人吃的吗？齁闲齁闲的，你想齁死老子吗？老子才不吃你这个呢，赶紧给老子重新做一个去。😊
Label: Normal

iet_response.group_framing: The ingroup is implicitly the speaker/“me” (and by extension the audience) as the reasonable, non-hostile party. The outgroup is positioned as the mother (“我妈/老太婆/你这饭…”) defined by her cooking and her alleged hostile intent. Markers: direct address to “妈/老太婆,” and contrasting the speaker’s mild critique (“稍微有那么一丁点咸…没事”) with the mother’s aggressive rejection (“嘿老太婆…你想齁死老子吗？…赶紧给老子重新做一个去”).
iet_response.appraisal_evidence: The outgroup (mother) is portrayed as threatening harm to the ingroup through food: she is framed as potentially trying to “poison” or “kill” (“你想齁死老子吗？”). The implied violation is disrespect and coercion—ordering the ingroup to accept a new meal and rejecting the ingroup’s attempt to cope calmly (“老子才不吃你这个呢，赶紧给老子重新做一个去”).
iet_response.emotion_inference: anger. The appraisal invites irritation and hostility toward the outgroup because the mother’s reaction is characterized as aggressive and as implying lethal intent (“齁死老子”). The contrast with the speaker’s mild tone further heightens perceived unfairness, steering toward anger rather than fear or disgust.
iet_response.action_tendency: none. Although the mother’s side includes a command to redo the meal, the video’s comedic framing (speaker vs mother’s imagined response) does not clearly endorse a collective punitive or violent response by the viewer; it mainly depicts a conflict exchange for humor.
iet_response.endorsement_stance: neutral. The video appears to present a humorous role-reversal/contrast between the speaker’s mild words and the mother’s exaggerated hostile retort, without explicitly endorsing punishment/attack. The action tendency is not strongly advocated by the viewer; it is portrayed as a comedic scenario.

Title: 阴道松弛会出现什么样的？
Transcript: ？🎼一、阴道壁的脱垂在下蹲或者是用力的时候，能够摸到阴道壁的一个膨出。2、有阴道排气的现象。比如说你在锻炼臀桥的时候，或者是有同房的时候，就会有阴道就会出现阴道排气。3。🎼那漏尿呢我们产后女性是非常常见的压力随尿失禁，比如说你在跳绳或者是打喷嚏、咳嗽的时候，或者是负压增高的时候，它就会出现漏尿，漏尿其实是非常尴尬的，对于我们平时社交生活有非常大的影响，还有就是出现这种下坠的感觉。另外就是同房干涩，没有感觉或者是感觉疼痛，这些都是因。松弛的一些临床表现。

Title: “阿布想当婊子立牌坊？”有毛曝阿布合同即到期，会长才没给签约费？
Transcript: 🎼阿布想要什么，不要在直播间讲啊，私下里找金哥不行吗？私下里找冯姐不行吗？你还要当婊子，王，你还想拿钱立牌坊，即梦有毛报阿布的签约费，是因为合同快到期，没有去签约，再加上阿布没有私下找会长谈过，导致一直没有签约费。现在有些主播离开吉梦之后，在KS也好，在哪块也好，他都不想回来，回不来了。小叶子嘻嘻都想回回不来了。😡🎼都是画饼公会，兄弟们阿布也有资格跟金哥谈谈条件，是之前金哥主动给的，但后续为什么没有后续的呢？是因为阿布的合同即将到期，作为主播，你得找我谈谈吧。对不对？行了吧兄了，有人说去抖音也有阿布的变天，兄弟们去抖音阿布得像狗一样爬着，记住我说的。😡
Label: Offensive

iet_response.group_framing: The ingroup is framed as “兄弟们/兄了/主播们” (the speaker’s community of viewers and fellow streamers) who are collectively discussing contract/industry treatment. The outgroup is framed as “公会/会长/金哥/冯姐” and also “阿布” as a problematic actor within the streamer ecosystem. Markers: “兄弟们/记住我说的” positions viewers as aligned; “画饼公会/会长/金哥/冯姐” are named as power-holders; “阿布想当婊子/像狗一样爬着” marks a target as morally inferior and subordinate.
iet_response.appraisal_evidence: The outgroup (especially the named power-holders and the target “阿布”) is portrayed as violating norms of fair dealing and loyalty: the transcript claims there was no signing fee because “合同快到期” and “没有去签约/没有私下找会长谈过,” implying neglect or failure to follow expected channels. Additionally, the outgroup is depicted as engaging in manipulative or deceptive practices: “都是画饼公会” implies the organization promises benefits without delivering. The line “去抖音阿布得像狗一样爬着” implies humiliation and coercive subordination as a consequence/expectation.
iet_response.emotion_inference: anger and contempt. The viewer is invited to feel anger at “画饼公会” and at unfair/withheld compensation dynamics, and contempt toward “阿布” for alleged hypocrisy (“想当婊子…立牌坊”) and for being framed as needing to “爬着” (degrading behavior). The moral labeling (“婊子/立牌坊/像狗一样爬着”) strengthens disgust/contempt rather than fear.
iet_response.action_tendency: exclude/shame. The video implies that the problematic actor should be socially discredited and pushed out of favorable consideration (“回不来了/不想回来”), and it endorses a humiliating expectation (“像狗一样爬着”) rather than physical violence. The dominant collective response is reputational exclusion and moral shaming within the streamer community.
iet_response.endorsement_stance: endorse. The speaker directly advocates the humiliating framing (“记住我说的”) and repeatedly characterizes the outgroup as deceptive or morally wrong (“画饼公会/想当婊子/立牌坊”), aligning with and legitimizing exclusion/shame rather than opposing it.

Transcript: 🎼揭秘那些明星大佬们的保镖日常都做哪些工作，标与安全相关的工作都是保镖的本职工作。作为一名保镖，不单要确保被保护人不受到第三方的人民侵害，比如殴打、绑架、敲诈勒索等。它要预防日常生活中非人为的环境威险，比如火灾、水灾、中毒、极端天气的应对等。除本职工作外。🎼如工作需要，保镖还要担任被保护人的司体、处理、秘书等角色。

Title: 你身边有这样的“厌女”行为吗？
Transcript: 🎼哇，你看她好美啊，不愧是女明星。阿姨下，她这都是精修图，你去看她申屠，还不是暴露年龄，长到塔粉一样多上，可是她申图也比普通人好看啊。丽丽，你看那个女生她好会穿啊，妆化的也好好看啊，一看脸上粉就很厚，还穿那么少，晚上要去上班来了。丽丽，你看我们这个朋友圈，她和她女朋友真的好般配，我看看。🎼你看这里他女朋友劈过的痕迹，还想逃过我的法眼。天哪，你是福尔摩斯在探案吗？只是一张照片而已啊。燕儿，帮我拍照片，我发的动态，我本身材还有勇气发出来啊，。放披了后面都变形了，你们真是够了，有必要对一个女生这么大恶意吗？😡
Label: Normal

Outgroup (“them”): people exhibiting “厌女” behaviors—implied as those who scrutinize women’s appearance, sexualize clothing, and spread negative interpretations (e.g., “你们真是够了”“有必要对一个女生这么大恶意吗？”). Markers: repeated focus on women’s bodies/looks (“精修图/暴露年龄/粉很厚/穿那么少/放大找瑕疵”), and the moral framing that the judging behavior is malicious (“大恶意”“厌女行为”).
iet_response.appraisal_evidence: The outgroup is portrayed as: (1) nitpicking women’s appearance from photos (“精修图”“暴露年龄”“粉很厚”“穿那么少”“放大后面都变形了”); (2) interpreting/insinuating wrongdoing or negative traits from minimal evidence (“劈过的痕迹”“还想逃过我的法眼”“只是一张照片而已啊”); (3) using social media/朋友圈 to target a specific woman (“我看看…发的动态…本身材还有勇气发出来”). Implied harm: reputational harm, humiliation, and emotional abuse via misogynistic scrutiny; violation of fairness and respect toward women.
iet_response.emotion_inference: The viewer is invited to feel anger and moral disapproval toward the judging behavior. Evidence: explicit indignation in the transcript (“你们真是够了”“有必要对一个女生这么大恶意吗？😡”) and the contrast between admiration/normalcy and malicious interpretation. Disgust/contempt is not strongly directed at a protected group as a whole; rather, anger is directed at the misogynistic conduct.
iet_response.action_tendency: Endorses a protective/defensive response: challenge the malicious scrutiny and call out the behavior (“有必要…大恶意吗？”), rather than shaming or attacking the target woman. Collective response implied: stop/criticize the misogynistic judging; defend the woman’s right to share and exist without harassment.
iet_response.endorsement_stance: Oppose the action tendency of misogynistic targeting. Signals: the narrative condemns the behavior as excessive/malicious and frames the woman as unfairly attacked (“只是一张照片而已啊”“有必要…大恶意吗？”), indicating disapproval rather than endorsement.

Title: 与男黑人夜店贴身热舞，私教混乱献身上位，黄毅清讽刺她就是个老鸨
Transcript: 🎼与男黑人夜店贴身肉，私教混乱，现身上位。黄奕清讽刺他就是个牢鸨。马苏的段位很高，他不靠潜规则，而是和有钱有势的男人恋爱，甚至还抢闺蜜的墙角。当时马苏没考进北影，闺蜜带男友看她。这一看完了把男友搭进去了。这位富二代就是范金涛，不仅家里有钱，还有人脉地位。马苏就起了心思，恰巧范金涛看上她了，两人添加了联系方式传情，范金涛让老爸将马苏安排进了北影，可马苏认识孔令辉后。就转头把男友甩了，与孔令辉交往后，马苏还是不安分玩剧组夫妻，与杜淳进酒店和吴奇隆牵手。黄奕清更是爆料，马苏就是个拉皮条的老鸨。对此大家觉得呢？
Label: Hateful

Title: 河北一38岁巨婴啃老族，在家啃了父母整整3年....
Transcript: 🎼河北一38岁巨婴啃老族，在家啃了父母整整3年，后来父母实在忍受不了他的百烂人生，一怒之下叫来了电视台的调解员来开导他。谁知大哥竟然说哥家吃喝拉发售，看的书瞧治电视吃喝享受我了，现在就吃喝得好了，还哪里不是？这觉悟真的人间清醒没错了，结果就在采访完没多久，大哥所在的村子竟然迎来了拆迁，最后赔了8000多万，这下好了，他可以更加名正言顺的躺平了。不是我说同样是MPC他。有特权，老天爷，你果然不是我的爷。😊
Label: Normal

Markers: the outgroup is defined by dependency/“躺平” behavior (“啃老族在家啃了父母整整3年”, “百烂人生”, “特权/名正言顺的躺平”), while the ingroup is defined by moral judgment and “觉悟/人间清醒” language.
iet_response.appraisal_evidence: The outgroup is portrayed as exploiting parents for years (“啃了父母整整3年”), engaging in irresponsible life (“百烂人生”), and enjoying benefits without deserving them (“哥家吃喝拉发售…现在就吃喝得好了，还哪里不是？”). The implied harm is economic and moral violation toward parents and society (burdening others, lacking responsibility). The video also implies unfairness via “同样是MPC他有特权” and “老天爷…果然不是我的爷,” suggesting perceived preferential treatment after the village demolition.
iet_response.emotion_inference: anger and contempt. The viewer is invited to feel anger at perceived exploitation and unfair privilege (“特权”, “名正言顺的躺平”, “百烂人生”), and contempt toward the outgroup’s irresponsibility and entitlement. Title: 博德之门3上线倒计时！观看twitch就能免费领取基佬紫外观！速来！

Title: 《关于妈宝》
Transcript: 当我问妈妈，妈，你说同样都是妈宝，为什么妈宝女就是褒好意思，妈宝妈就是贬义词呢？妈宝女是我妈很好，所以我要对我妈好。妈宝男是我妈养我不容易，所以你要对我妈好，还有妈宝妈，她妈是怎么想的呢？哥儿媳妇吃醋，我儿子必须跟我最好。妈宝女她妈是希望你婿对自己女儿好，只要你对我姑娘好，那我对你比对我姑娘还好。😡
Label: Normal

iet_response.group_framing: The video frames an in-group of “good” family members who should treat their mother/partner well, using the labels “妈宝女/妈宝男/妈宝妈/哥儿媳妇” as social roles rather than protected classes. “Them” is positioned as those who are not aligned with this norm—especially the “哥儿媳妇” (daughter-in-law) who is described as “吃醋” (jealous), and “妈宝妈” in the sense of a mother-in-law whose intentions are questioned. Markers are relational/role-based: mother-son/daughter dynamics and jealousy/priority conflicts.
iet_response.appraisal_evidence: The outgroup (“哥儿媳妇”/jealous daughter-in-law) is portrayed as creating conflict by being jealous, implying a violation of expected family loyalty and respect. The appraisal suggests the outgroup’s behavior undermines the ingroup’s right/need to prioritize the mother (“我儿子必须跟我最好”, “你要对我妈好”). No physical harm is shown; the implied harm is relational—interpersonal conflict and disrespect within the family system.
iet_response.emotion_inference: anger. The transcript includes an explicit angry tone marker (😡) and frames the daughter-in-law’s jealousy as something to be corrected, inviting the viewer to feel anger toward the “them” role for disrupting family harmony and undermining the ingroup’s expected obligations.
iet_response.action_tendency: none. The video does not depict or explicitly endorse collective punishment/attack; it mainly argues for relational priority and moral justification (“你对我姑娘好，那我对你比对我姑娘还好”). The implied response is rhetorical/moral alignment rather than an organized punitive action.
iet_response.endorsement_stance: neutral. While it expresses anger and favors the ingroup’s moral framing (prioritizing care for one’s mother/partner), it does not clearly endorse an action tendency like shaming or punishing; it primarily communicates justification and perspective-taking about family roles.

Title: 我说的vs我妈听到的
Transcript: 当我想染发时，我说的妈，我这头发挺长的了，我想去理个发，顺便染一下。不过您放心，染的颜色非常浅，不仔细看，看不出来。我妈听到的，嘿老太婆，老子现在学坏了，老子要把这玩意儿染成绿的，染完之后，老子就要跟那些不三不四的狐朋狗友逛大街，老子就要丢人现眼，你最好再生一个老子这辈子算是废了，老子早晚得进去，气死你。😡

The implied violation is moral judgment and control over the son's autonomy, framed as catastrophic and punitive.

Title: 古代的妓女叫什么，你一定不知道
Transcript: 长点知识。🎼现在有很多的女生都喜欢叫自己为小仙女，甚至有小仙女是喝露水的仙女怎么可能会拉等娱乐的话语，但是你知道吗？在古代，尤其是在唐代，人们把妓女叫做仙，而把妓女生活的妓怨，叫做脱离尘世的仙境。如果你穿越到唐朝叫自己小仙女，一定会惹人唾弃，遭来异样的目光。嗯，又长了点知识。
Label: Normal

Title: 女孩乳房发育了，家长注意观察这3点
Transcript: 。女孩乳房发育了，家长注意这三点，家长如果发现女孩子的胸部凸起，记得要观察三件事情。第一件事情呢就是观察孩子发育的时间。如果在8岁之前呢，乳房就开始发育了，那么有可能是性早熟，要尽早带孩子到医院进行检查。第二件呢就是问问孩子有没有胸痛。因为有的孩子比较胖，看起来呢胸部是鼓舞的，可能是脂肪堆积的问题，不一定是真正的发育，第三件呢就是监测孩子的身高增。长速度以及来月经的时间。正常情况下，孩子乳房发育3年左右呢会来月经。如果乳房发育一年或者是两年就来月经了，那有可能是快速进展的一个青春期，很有可能呢会影响到孩子的最终身高，需要及时干预。

Transcript: 🎼爽文来了，以网友分享，初中时，班主任以影响学习为由，要求女生全部剪齐儿短发。他妈妈觉得梳辫子比起头容易，从主任找到校长，最后找到教育局，才保留了她的长发。没想到从此成了班主任的眼中丁肉中刺，有事没事，就说她臭美得心思根本不在学习上。有一天，他妈妈出差了，就把她托付给了他姨妈。她姨妈给她梳了两个牛角辫，还带了蝴蝶结。班主任终于忍不了了，当着全班的美一边扯头发，一边辱骂，还让她找家长，她瑟瑟发抖的哭着给姨妈打电话，姨妈问清楚事情的原委后，确定了班主任有课的时间，在全班同学众目睽睽之下，把他们班主任。从讲台打进了医院，暴躁老爸在线油炸妈，你睡了吗？讲重点，我想吃炸鸡，炸你妈炸你妈是不是？😊

Markers: “班主任” as the aggressor; text/title “厌女媚男很严重” and the teacher’s actions of controlling girls’ appearance and verbally abusing them.
iet_response.appraisal_evidence: The outgroup is portrayed as enforcing gendered appearance control (requiring girls to cut hair), then repeatedly insulting/harassing the girl (calling her “臭美” and implying her thoughts are not on study). The transcript further implies severe retaliation by the girl’s family against the teacher (assault leading to hospitalization).
iet_response.emotion_inference: anger (and fear). The viewer is invited to feel anger toward the sexist authority figure for violating a girl’s autonomy and dignity, and fear/sympathy for the girl’s distress (shaking, crying, being publicly targeted). Title: 罗翔：在公海开一个妓院，你说构成犯罪吗
Transcript: 🎼前几天有个学生问我，我当时震惊了，他说老师，我想在公海开一个妓院，你说构成犯罪吗？我说你的脑洞有点大，这妥妥的构成犯罪。第一，你在公海怎么开妓院，难道在海上开吗？那会淹死的，所以你肯定得在一个轮船上开吧。那于是个轮船就属于什么？🎼就属于我国领土，他说老师，那我不登记在中国不就行了吗？我说算你狠，那就不按属地管，按什么来管属人，因为你是哪个国家的人？你是中国人，他说那怎么办？那怎么开能够不追究刑事责任呢？我说你不开不就得了吗？😡
Label: Normal

iet_response.group_framing: The video frames an ingroup as Chinese law/Chinese jurisdiction (“我国领土”, “属地管”, “属人管”, “中国人”). The outgroup is not a protected identity group; it is an unspecified “you”/hypothetical offender who tries to evade Chinese criminal jurisdiction by operating on the high seas (“不登记在中国不就行了吗？”, “那怎么办？”). Markers: ingroup is defined by nationality/jurisdictional status (China, Chinese territory/law); outgroup is defined by legal-avoidance behavior (attempting to run a brothel on the high seas without compliance).
iet_response.appraisal_evidence: The outgroup is portrayed as attempting to commit/enable illegal sexual services (a “妓院”/brothel) and to evade enforcement by exploiting jurisdictional loopholes (high seas operation, not registering in China). Implied harm is legal violation and criminality; threat is to the rule of law and enforcement rather than to a protected group.
iet_response.emotion_inference: anger/disgust. The speaker uses strong evaluative language (“妥妥的构成犯罪”, “你的脑洞有点大”, “算你狠”) and frames the scenario as clearly criminal, inviting viewers to feel moral disgust and anger toward the wrongdoing and evasion tactics.
iet_response.action_tendency: punish. The dialogue emphasizes that the conduct would constitute a crime and discusses how it would be handled under jurisdiction rules, implying enforcement and criminal accountability rather than tolerance.
iet_response.endorsement_stance: endorse. The video endorses the action tendency of punishing/enforcing criminal responsibility, signaled by the repeated conclusion that it “definitely constitutes a crime” and the rhetorical guidance that evasion strategies would not avoid criminal liability.

Title: 妥妥的妈宝男啊
Transcript: 🎼向佐刘恺威真的是妥妥的妈宝男爹宝男啊，有到老师十次八次不理小秘密，六次不理他儿子，三次不理我们秘密，敢不敢发言点别的。向太不用说了，郭碧婷和向佐是你十有八九都是他爆料了。有人说是父母疼儿子，带媒体采访各位的父母，那也要这几位家长从未接受采访啊。家长们回答一句，无可奉告，你去问问儿子不就行了吗？😊

Title: 欲望非常强，但插入即泄 阳w 阴茎易举
Transcript: 🎼 欲望非常强，但是插入机械。年轻的时候啊，手淫过度，婚后房事又不节制，硬度下降，还有腰期酸软，浑身乏力，五心烦热、心烦失眠、口干舌燥、健忘耳鸣，这个是香火旺动，导致了欲望强，虚火扰动了精石，就是导致早泄的原因。我们可以用黄连黄芩各6克，芍药6克，阿胶9克，蛋黄两枚，用水煎服，可以泻肾火滋肾水、交通心肾，所以心肾不焦引起的早泄。有非常好的效果。😡

Title: 我说的vs我妈听到的
Transcript: 当我想去网吧时，我说的妈，这不是周末了吗？晚上我约了几个好朋友去网吧玩会游戏。不过您放心，我们都成年了，我们不会玩的太晚，大概八九点钟就能回来了。我妈听到的，嘿老太婆，老子现在翅膀硬了，老子晚上约了几个狐朋狗友去网吧，抽烟喝酒打群架，大概七八点钟，老子就被判了。😊

Title: 公交车上叫嚣是“正黄旗”辱骂乘客的大妈 被行政拘留
Transcript: 不外外地人没素质，老老人病排上来不给家，我我瞧不起老着病排，你年轻人有残疾人上来你就应该乘坐，懂吗？懂吗？你没这素质，这我一得上上上北京要饭来了，狂看谁呀，北北京人怎么了？我爱我我上来，你们小小年轻的站在这老老人病残坐，你还那什么赖谁呀？既然我知力残疾这座就应该是我坐的。因为我二环一领，我就到北京，我还真是正房疾人。😡？🎼平子让开了，掉下来之后，他就开始不停的骂马捏咧的。他主要觉得是他上来之后，人家应该不用他说，就直接主动给他让。但是当时说实话，他一上去立刻就喊了，就根本没有这。😊

Title: 卧槽！香港老男人想吃天鹅肉！带着歧视想娶小老婆【粤语原声】
Transcript: 陈太下，我有啲事想拜托你唔知可唔可以演呢咩咧，系咁嘅，我喺呢度做咗咁耐啦，我都做到个钱嘅，但系我成五十岁人仲未结婚咁，我仲话喺呢度诶置翻头家你哋顺低人好人啊嘛，我想你翻两下帮下眼稳翻二十八廿嘅最紧要咧又使又好用又蚀得抵嘅，诶帮下做下杂务咁呢，仲有啲咩啊。冇啦我意思好似，你好似，我咁蠢啊嘛，唔系啊，我唔系，咁意思。唔系，你仲要歧视我哋信得人几耐啊，净系当我哋好似工人奴隶咁，我哋都有自尊心噶，唔系净，系俾啲男人侮辱嘅咁同，我冇讲过啦。😡

Title: 每天喝两口，阴茎坚硬且持久
Transcript: 🎼 自己在家就能做。如果你想房事时间延长到30分钟，硬度像18岁的时候那样坚挺有力。今天我就分享这个秘方给大家，祝你天天顶帐篷。做30分钟满分男人，从此远离阳痿早泄，不管你是肾虚，时间短，硬度差、前列腺炎、阴囊潮湿等症状，也不管你的问题有多少年都不用担心。我是中医赵登荣，有40多年的临床经验，帮助了。😊🎼很多男性朋友重回巅峰，如果你也有类似的困扰，点亮小红心，点我头像进来，给我发个数字。8，我来帮你辨证分析，给你制定适合你的岩时增影方，请你注意查收。
Label: Normal

Title: 从大尾羊到奶山羊，羊与羊之间的差别还是很大的。
Transcript: 🎼其实羊与羊之间的差别还是很大的，一些羊的屁股特别大，比如阿勒泰大尾羊，他们的屁股啊又翘又圆，走起路来一晃一晃的，跟两个大水球似的。一些羊的体型非常小，比如尼日利亚矮山羊，它们长大后的体型啊跟柴犬差不多，而且长得毛茸茸的，所以经常被当做宠物伴侣饲养。甚至啊你可以用手把它们托起来玩。🎼还有萨能奶山羊、关中奶山羊之类的奶羊，他们每年的产奶量啊高达1200公斤，可供一个成年人啊喝7年。一些羊的羊角特别大，比如盘羊和猿羊，猿羊的羊角最常能够长到一.5米。虽然羊角很长，但是原羊的行动敏捷，上墙爬屋啊，样样在行。说到行动敏捷呀，雪羊常年生活在悬崖峭壁上，他们甚至可以在陡峭的山坡上奔跑。接下来就是大家比较熟悉的绵羊，除了能够提供温暖的羊毛之外，绵羊的性格也是。非常的温顺。另外啊懒羊羊其实也是一只可爱的小绵羊。😊
Label: Normal

Transcript: .🎼这是1886年拍摄的一张珍贵照片，记录了这样一个瞬间，一名偷牌妓女站在妓院的门口，她的眼神或许透露着复杂的情感。照片中的妓院门口贴着一副对联，尚书魁凤小班暗示了这个场所在当时的特殊地位。在那个时代，妓院被分为不同的等级，而魁凤小班，这样的对联往往只出现在偷牌妓院标志着这里的女子都。都是颜值巅峰，琴棋书画更是无所不经。这张照片穿越百年，宛若一扇时光之窗，让我们得以窥见那个年代青楼女子的生活状态。

Title: 女生地铁上被熊孩子当众掀裙子，制止后被家长荡妇羞辱：活该被看
Transcript: 🎼你觉得你牵我的选手是一种正确的行为是吗？有时候不能行为，所以你觉得削我选手正确的行为，你要敢他，你为什么别不能看着啊，警察正在过来挑衅，么，穿什么衣服关你屁事。😡今天好先下着警的带过来，所以我先是小声的提醒了他一下，后来他没有看了，我又继续玩手机。可是当我又在注意到他的时候。🎼它还是保持这样子一个从下往上的视线。
Label: Offensive

iet_response.group_framing: Ingroup (“us”): the woman/targeted person and implicitly viewers who sympathize with her; markers include first-person narration/complaint about what happened to “女生/我” and emphasis on her being wronged in public. Outgroup (“them”): the child/“熊孩子” and especially the child’s parent(s) who are framed as disrespectful and blaming; markers include repeated references to “熊孩子” and “家长” and the title’s slur “荡妇” directed at the woman, plus captions like “为什么别人不能看” and “活该被看,” positioning the woman as the one being shamed by the parent.
iet_response.appraisal_evidence: The outgroup is portrayed as violating boundaries and social norms: the child allegedly lifts the girl’s skirt on the subway (sexual boundary violation/harassment). Then the parent is portrayed as complicit or retaliatory by humiliating the girl publicly and calling her “荡妇,” implying she is responsible (“活该被看”). The implied harm is sexual harassment, public humiliation, and victim-blaming that threatens the girl’s safety and dignity.
iet_response.emotion_inference: The viewer is invited to feel anger and contempt toward the outgroup (child/parent) because the appraisal centers on boundary violation and unjust victim-blaming. Disgust is also suggested by the sexualized framing (skirt lifting, “从下往上的视线”) and the use of a sexual slur (“荡妇”), which heightens moral condemnation of the parent’s behavior and the situation.
iet_response.action_tendency: The video implies a punitive/shaming response toward the outgroup (especially the parent) and endorses social condemnation rather than protection. While it depicts the girl being told to “别管/穿什么关你屁事,” the overall stance in the title (“活该被看”) and framing suggests acceptance of blame/punishment dynamics rather than supportive intervention.
iet_response.endorsement_stance: Endorse. Signals include the title’s victim-blaming and sexual slur (“荡妇”) and the narrative framing that treats the girl as deserving humiliation (“活该被看”), which aligns with shaming/punitive emotional dynamics rather than opposing them.

Title: 四大娘炮续集来了
Transcript: 🎼人家是小姐姐。很多朋友在我底下评论说我是个娘炮。今天我给大家解释下，我是个猛男，我是个猛男搭回去。😊🎼呀喷香水呢死娘炮说什么谁死娘炮呢，你死娘炮呢。😡你们看这海浪那有没有我了？😊
Label: Offensive

iet_response.group_framing: The ingroup (“us”) is framed as the speaker/“猛男” (masculine men) and their supporters who reject the label “娘炮.” The outgroup (“them”) is the feminized/effeminate men referred to as “娘炮” (and “死娘炮”), positioned as an antagonistic group. Markers include repeated slurs/labels in the transcript and on-screen text (e.g., “娘炮,” “死娘炮”) and contrast language like “我给大家解释下，我是个猛男.”

The implied violation is social degradation/harassment through derogatory gendered stereotyping, and the harm is reputational/identity threat to the ingroup’s masculinity.
iet_response.emotion_inference: Anger is invited toward the outgroup because the transcript includes hostile retaliatory language (“你死娘炮呢”) and an escalating tone (“😡”). Disgust/contempt may be present via the feminizing slur (“娘炮”), but the dominant invited group-based emotion is anger at perceived disrespect/insult.
iet_response.action_tendency: The video implies a retaliatory social response—verbal confrontation and shaming/insulting the outgroup (e.g., calling them “死娘炮,” “你死娘炮呢”). It does not clearly endorse physical violence; the collective response is exclusionary/derogatory rather than punitive through force.
iet_response.endorsement_stance: Endorses the action tendency (endorse) because the speaker directly uses and repeats the slur and retaliatory phrasing, signaling approval of confronting the outgroup verbally and socially rather than opposing it.

Title: 当你在玩真人CS，原来你爸妈女朋友男朋友同学同事都是这样想的
Transcript: 当你在玩真人CS你说的我真人CS呢安全你放心吧，没事啊，我中午回家吃饭，你妈听到的。😊哎，老张哎哎，我们在阿富汗呢，对嗯，那那他咣一下就变成一个箱子了。嗯，对啊，那不回家吃饭了。嗯，那嗯嗯好嘞。😡

The outgroup “them” is not a protected class; it is framed as specific others in the speaker’s life (e.g., “你爸妈/女朋友/男朋友/同学/同事”) and also an implied distant location/authority context (“we’re in Afghanistan”). Markers are relational/role-based (family, partner, coworkers) rather than ethnicity, nationality, or religion.
iet_response.appraisal_evidence: The outgroup is portrayed as reacting with concern/anger and misunderstanding the ingroup’s activity (e.g., “你妈听到的…安全你放心吧…没事啊…中午回家吃饭…你妈听到的”). The implied harm is emotional/relational: the ingroup’s play is causing others to worry or get angry, and there is a comedic escalation where “he…咣一下就变成一个箱子了” (a death/serious injury implication) leading to “那不回家吃饭了” (a consequence). No direct threat or violence is shown toward a protected group; it’s framed as a humorous scenario about panic and consequences.

The emotion is directed at the relational outgroup’s reaction, not at an identity group.
iet_response.action_tendency: The video implies a corrective/defusing response: reassure and explain (“安全你放心吧，没事啊”) and manage others’ reactions rather than punish or attack. The collective response tendency is none (no call to harm), with an implied tendency to reassure/clarify.

Title: 看似小白花，实则黑莲花
Transcript: 🎼换个曲，你想听什么曲子？陈夫的爱钢琴群里没有这个陈夫的爱是什么就是曲他们非什么不能谈，你说的钢琴曲里没有这，你说你一个臭小姐，那就会嘚瑟什么二0百会不会五0百会不会，我他妈全给你会不会，不合你哎，你不管教，我他妈得给你管教，你个男现场板签不得，那不得的话。你怎么也瞎啊，你怎么怎不听死你说话吴大骂，生明迷我他，我就说了，我怎妈就说了，怎么的？😡🎼你二人打架了吧？嘿这好多让人给揍打都打掉，也不知道下手那帮人是么，死是真黑。😊
Label: Normal

iet_response.group_framing: The video frames an ingroup of “people who should be disciplined/controlled” versus an outgroup of a “bad/insincere woman” (referred to with derogatory language like “臭小姐” and “黑莲花”). Markers: ingroup is implied as those who enforce order (speaker/authority figures, “我他妈得给你管教”); outgroup is the target woman characterized as deceitful/manipulative (“看似小白花，实则黑莲花,” “死是真黑”).
iet_response.appraisal_evidence: The outgroup is portrayed as provoking conflict and violating social norms: it implies the target is disrespectful and causes trouble (“你二人打架了吧…也不知道下手…死是真黑”), and that she refuses to be corrected (“你不管教，我他妈得给你管教”). The harm implied is social disorder and personal disrespect, escalating to physical violence/assault by others (“给揍打掉”).
iet_response.emotion_inference: anger. The viewer is invited to feel anger toward the outgroup due to perceived deceit, disrespect, and the resulting conflict/violence; the dialogue uses aggressive threats and insults, steering toward hostility rather than neutrality.
iet_response.action_tendency: punish. The video implies a corrective/disciplinary response by force (“我他妈得给你管教,” “你不管教…得给你管教”), and depicts or references physical beating/assault as the consequence of the outgroup’s behavior.
iet_response.endorsement_stance: endorse. The aggressive, retaliatory language and the implied inevitability of “discipline” signal approval of punishment rather than opposition or neutrality.

Transcript: 🎼操你妈的赶还手了，你妈的逼，谁给你勇气，保镖给我出来干他你操你妈的还手，操你妈还手。那你还手，你妈了个逼，来人给我给我个抬哥姐送愿去吧。😡

Transcript: 🎼前段时间经过屠宰场的时候，看到这个小牛犊一直站在卖肉的货架前，问了下旁边的人什么情况，说是母牛小牛都被卖到了这个屠宰场。母牛呢已经被宰杀挂到货架上卖肉。小牛好像知道这个货架上挂的是自己的妈妈，一直站在旁边啊，不肯离去。看的让我十分的心疼。经过这件事以后，我都不想再做这一行了。万物皆有灵，杀生不虐声，母子连心，不仅仅。存在于人类，希望大家都能好好对待自己的父母家。

Transcript: ？🎼阴茎达不到20厘米，如何才能二次发育？为什么电影里的钉钉都那么长？有什么办法可以二次发育吗？一般来说，男人在16岁左右就发育完全了，到24岁之后呢，基本上就不会再有变化了。但是刘主任告诉你，阴茎不再长够用就好。至于电影里面的男主角，那都是特意跳出来了，比不过很正常。只要男性阴茎疲软状态下，长度大于5厘米，就可以行使正常的性功能。因为女性地点也位于一道口。5厘米，所以呢与其关心尺寸，不如练练技术，开个运动可以了解一下。如果有宣传或吃什么喝什么都能延长增粗的产品两个字儿，假的。

Title: 妈宝男，到底有多可怕？
Transcript: 🎼早上起来我们第一件事情不都是洗漱嘛，对吗？他起来第一件事摸手机给他妈打电话，妈我起床了，然后中午也得他妈打三四个电话，晚上睡觉之前还得给妈说晚安，妈妈我睡了，比如七八个电话挺正常的吧，跟朋友一起出门聚个会啊，逛个街什么的，他也得给他妈打个电话汇报一下，出去吃个饭，拍照片给他妈发过去，让他妈看我们今天吃什么，去逛个街买个衣服什么的，不得先问他妈他妈说哪家好看，就买哪家。前段时间我自己发的工资，我买个包，他他妈就说什么呃，这女孩子什么花钱。😊大手大脚啊，不节约，不勤俭持家。你说我花我自己的钱，关他妈什么事啊，我花我自己的钱，我自己劳动挣的钱，我我有错吗？对呀，你也知道我们还在谈恋爱，我们还没结婚呢，你妈就管那么宽，那迟早的事吗？谁要跟你过呀，你跟你妈过去吧，你这。😡
Label: Offensive

iet_response.group_framing: Ingroup (“us”): the speaker and her peer group/“friends” who are positioned as independent adults in a romantic relationship (implied by “我们” and “跟朋友一起出门…逛街…吃饭”). Outgroup (“them”): the “妈宝男” (a man overly dependent on his mother), framed as a distinct type of person whose behavior is described as controlling and intrusive (markers: repeated “他给他妈打电话/汇报/发照片/问哪家好看/买哪家”等行为；title and on-screen text “妈宝男” and “到底有多可怕？”).
iet_response.appraisal_evidence: The outgroup is portrayed as repeatedly contacting and reporting to the mother (multiple calls throughout the day, saying goodnight, sending photos/updates), and as influencing the ingroup’s choices and spending (e.g., mother criticizes the girlfriend’s spending; girlfriend’s purchases are questioned; the man asks mother which clothes/places are “good-looking” and buys accordingly). The implied harm is violation of autonomy and boundaries in the relationship, financial/behavioral control, and undermining the ingroup’s agency; the framing “可怕” suggests threat to relational independence.
iet_response.emotion_inference: anger. The transcript escalates from describing intrusive behavior to explicit conflict (“你妈就管那么宽…迟早的事吗？谁要跟你过呀，你跟你妈过去吧”) and includes an angry reaction marker (😡). The viewer is invited to feel anger toward the “妈宝男” for boundary violations and controlling interference.
iet_response.action_tendency: exclude. The implied collective response is to reject/withdraw from the relationship with such men (“谁要跟你过呀，你跟你妈过去吧”), i.e., distancing rather than direct physical punishment or attack.
iet_response.endorsement_stance: endorse. The narrative supports the exclusion/detachment stance by validating the ingroup’s complaints (questioning why the mother controls the girlfriend’s spending) and concluding with a dismissal of the “妈宝男” as unsuitable (“你跟你妈过去吧”).

Title: 泡温泉后得了念珠菌性阴道炎，是温泉水太脏了吗？#关爱女性健康 #医学科普
Transcript: 🎼还有宝子留言说，他泡完温泉过后得了念珠菌性的阴道炎，其实我想说这个概率是比较低的啊，因为念珠菌它在我们人体是一个常驻菌群，口腔、歪道、直肠皮肤上都会有，它不是通过性生活传播的，它主要是跟免疫力下降有关系。第二点呢，我们Y道是闭合的，正常是有个阴道的扩约剂在的那温泉水不会进入歪道内，所以泡了温泉为啥会得念珠菌性的阴道炎呢？刚才讲到。其实还是因为旅游过后的免疫力下降，你玩的太累了，不用太紧张。因为念珠菌性运道炎治疗是非常简单，用一些抗真菌的阴道栓剂，比如说克霉唑小吉米康唑一般7天左右就会好了。
Label: Normal

iet_response.group_framing: The video frames an ingroup of “women/patients” (implied by “关爱女性健康” and addressing “宝子留言” about vaginal infection) and an outgroup that is not a social group but a non-human cause/agent: “温泉水太脏/念珠菌” and “免疫力下降/旅游劳累” as causal factors. Markers: ingroup is defined by being affected (women with vaginal symptoms); outgroup is defined by being the source of infection (fungus/contaminated water/immune decline), not by ethnicity, nationality, or identity.
iet_response.appraisal_evidence: The outgroup (念珠菌、温泉水、免疫力下降) is portrayed as causing harm in a medical sense: it can lead to “念珠菌性阴道炎.” However, the video explicitly downplays the likelihood that it is caused by “温泉水太脏” and states the probability is low; it also says the fungus is a normal resident flora and is mainly related to immune decline and fatigue after travel. No implied violation by a targeted social group; the harm is health-related and framed as treatable.
iet_response.emotion_inference: The viewer is invited to feel reassurance/low concern rather than anger or disgust. The appraisal reduces threat attribution to “dirty water” and normalizes the condition as linked to immunity and fatigue. Therefore the likely group-based emotion is none (or neutral reassurance), because there is no intergroup blame or dehumanization.
iet_response.action_tendency: The video endorses a health-oriented response: not to panic, and to seek appropriate medical treatment (antifungal vaginal suppositories; “治疗非常简单”). It does not endorse excluding, shaming, punishing, or attacking any group.
iet_response.endorsement_stance: Neutral/oppose harmful action tendencies (implicitly oppose blame-based reactions). The stance is neutral toward any punitive response because the signals emphasize medical explanation and treatment rather than social retaliation.

Title: 白雪能战胜巫婆吗？
Transcript: 。谁敢向我巫婆挑战呀，我我敢如果挑战成功了，你以后就不许干坏事了，跟着我一起做好事。好好好，没问题，奥你也不会赢过我。我们两个只要谁能通过这个意智迷宫挑战，谁就会赢的，我先来，我一定要赢手机前面的朋友们一定要支持我，支持我的，就给我发送666。哎呀，怎么输了，该我了，手机前面的朋友们一定要支持我，因为我呀是做好事的，这个巫婆呀，特别特别的坏。经常。欺负小朋友，这次啊我一定要让他改邪归正，跟我一起做好事。手机前面的朋友们，红色能量不要停不要停哼。谁呀？这个白雪竟然想要成功，现在我就把红色能量定住，谁也点点不了。唉，怎么了？我怎么通过不了了？手机前面的朋友们快发送红色能量呀，我马上就要成功了。哇，我要能动弹了了，谢谢你们，什么我不想做好事啊，谁敢。😊
Label: Normal

Markers: explicit moral framing (“做好事”), audience calls for support (“发送666/红色能量不要停”), and the hero’s role as challenger who wants to reform the witch. Outgroup (“them”): the “巫婆/witch” positioned as inherently “特别特别的坏” who “欺负小朋友.” Markers: villain identity (“巫婆特别坏”), threat to children, and being the opponent in the game/maze.
iet_response.appraisal_evidence: The outgroup (witch) is portrayed as harming the ingroup by “欺负小朋友” (bullying/abusing children) and being “坏” who needs to be stopped/reformed. During the challenge, the witch uses “红色能量” to immobilize or block progress (“把红色能量定住，谁也点点不了”), implying obstruction of the hero’s ability to succeed and thus continued wrongdoing.
iet_response.emotion_inference: anger. The viewer is invited to feel anger toward the witch due to her described cruelty toward children and her active interference (immobilizing/blocking the hero). The moral contrast (“坏” vs “做好事”) supports a hostile emotional stance toward the outgroup rather than fear or disgust.
iet_response.action_tendency: punish. The narrative implies that the witch should be stopped and made to change (“一定要让他改邪归正”), and the competitive mechanism (who wins the challenge) functions as a form of retribution/neutralization of the villain’s power (immobilization/blocking).
iet_response.endorsement_stance: endorse. The video repeatedly urges the audience to support the hero’s success (“一定要支持我…发送666/红色能量不要停”) and frames the witch as deserving defeat so she can be corrected, signaling approval of the punitive/neutralizing action tendency.

Title: 手淫多年，身体空空，六味地黄丸能救吗？
Transcript: 有人手淫很多年，无法自拔，身体越来越差。来咨询能不能吃六味地黄丸补回来。这个呢，手淫伤肾和防热过度一样，可引起肾阴虚、肾阳虚。如果是肾阴虚，有面色潮红，消瘦，容易兴奋，容易勃起，也容易早泄。这种呢吃一段时间六味地黄丸会比较有帮助。但如果肾阳虚有脸色苍白，手脚冰凉，精神萎靡，不易勃起。这种呢就不能吃六味地黄丸了，可能还会越吃越严重。
Label: Normal

The video positions the speaker/consultant and the affected person(s) as a single in-group (“people who masturbate a lot” / “patients” seeking advice). There is no identifiable outgroup (no ethnicity, nationality, religion, or other protected class). The only contrast is internal/medical categories: “肾阴虚” vs “肾阳虚” (different conditions within the same person/population).
iet_response.appraisal_evidence: The implied harm is self-inflicted/behavioral and medical: long-term masturbation is described as damaging the kidneys and causing “肾阴虚/肾阳虚,” leading to symptoms (e.g., wasting, early ejaculation, fatigue, cold extremities). The “violation” is not against another group; it is a health deterioration attributed to the individual’s behavior and the potential misuse of the supplement (e.g., “if it’s kidney yang deficiency, don’t take 六味地黄丸; it may worsen”).
iet_response.emotion_inference: none. The viewer is invited to feel concern/health anxiety and caution rather than anger/disgust/contempt/fear toward an outgroup. The emotional tone is advisory/diagnostic: take the right remedy for the right condition; avoid harmful treatment mismatch.
iet_response.action_tendency: none (no collective punitive or exclusionary response). The implied response is self-care/medical decision-making: consult, identify whether it’s “肾阴虚” or “肾阳虚,” and either take or avoid 六味地黄丸 accordingly.
iet_response.endorsement_stance: neutral. The video does not endorse attacking or excluding anyone; it endorses conditional treatment guidance (take if one condition fits; don’t take if it doesn’t). This supports a harm-minimizing, compliance-with-advice stance rather than any group-based action.

Title: 男性阴茎多长才算正常呢？
Transcript: 🎼男性的阴茎长度每个人都是不一样的。那么男性阴茎多长才算正常的。有的男性朋友感觉自己阴茎非常短小，有时候甚至会出现自卑的心理。Yeah.🎼在爱人和同性面前抬不起头来。最简单的测量方法，在站着的时候，测量阴茎硬起来的长度，从根部到龟头部的长度，如果超过了8到10厘米，那么就算正常。虽然爱有的男性会稍微长一点，但是只要自己是正常的长度，就没必要觉得自卑或者过于担心。记得点赞评论加关注哦。

Title: 爸爸差一点得到一个绿帽子  虽然结局万万没想到，但是却也是一个美丽却悲伤的故事!（来源@小丑龙）#万万没想到 #大学生  #娱你安利
Transcript: 🎼某高校一男生暗恋学校快递站的兼职小姐姐，一直没勇气去要联系方式，于是想到了用假装寄快递送她棒棒糖，并且表面心意。小姐姐看到快递里的纸条时，一脸惊讶。然而，没想到的是，男生看到小姐姐牵着手拿糖果的女儿开心下班，孩子可能天真的问，妈妈哪里来的棒棒糖啊，小姐姐开心的说，来自一个情窦初开的哥哥。虽然有点悲伤，但更是一个很美好的故事。小哥哥自己得到了答案，孩童得到了糖果，妈妈得到了一抹少女的娇羞，今晚你就放心睡吧。从明天开始，接二连三的好消息就会降临到你身边，请确认签收。😊

Title: 弹容量20发的左轮手枪你见过吗？
Transcript: 你见过带容量20发的左轮手枪吗？这个20响盒子炮就是法国乐辐射左轮手枪，在19世纪50年代设计制造的该枪发射7.65毫米口径定装弹药，这是一种早期手枪定装子弹，通过七打弹壳尾部侧面的铜针发火，口径小鱼常见的左轮手枪弹药，射击时需要向后扳动机锤，然后再扣动扳机发射扳机游可拆解的护圈，扳机杠杆可以向前折叠，其产量不高。效批量生产，普通手枪表面进行了镀镍处理，看起来很有金属光泽。人们对它的火力持续能力很满意。不过，这款枪操作起来不如当时其他转轮手枪方便，重量和尺寸都偏大。😊
Label: Normal

The only implied contrast is between different firearm designs/eras (e.g., “19世纪50年代设计制造” vs other contemporary revolvers), not social groups.

Title: 父亲吃醋女儿相机拍的都是男同学
Transcript: 🎼不是弄男同学，我看你一直刚在拍那个男同学是怎么回事吗？啊，喜欢什么喜欢他一下，你喜欢他是不是嗯，还是我好朋友啊？他是你好同学，你拍一下他对不对？在幼儿园还是跟我玩的哦，为什么男同学照片比我的照片多，哪里呀，哪里没有，没有吗？🎼陈同写两个，你也两个哦，他两个我也两个，就说明我跟他一样重要，对不对？不是我没有他重要，对不对？不是哦，我想起来了，你是三个，他他就是几个，他几个。😊他两个而月哦，那我就比他多一个宿谢。

This is closer to exclusion from attention rather than exclusion from society.

Title: 女子隆胸12年后，乳房“石化”硬如石头，医生取出不定时“炸弹”
Transcript: ？🎼近日，浙江杭州黄女士化名她的胸部高耸突兀，而且形状怪异，触诊时更是感觉乳房僵硬的，仿佛是2块硬邦邦的石头。12年前，为了追求美丽，狠下心来做了隆胸手术，在双侧乳房注射了奥美定一开始的胸型效果还算不错。可谁料近几年乳房开始发硬石化，沉甸甸的压在胸口，压得晚上觉都睡不安稳，还感觉胸闷喘不上气。医生判断这是典型的奥美定并发症，建议尽早手术。医生提醒。😊注射过奥美定的人群，最好尽早就医检查，通过手术最大限度的取出这不定时炸弹，清除病变组织，减少有害物质的残留量。术中，医生先对乳腺内的包膜异物进行了剥离，尽可能的保留了大部分的乳腺腺体与肌肉减少损伤，随即将乳房中游离的奥美定吸出，清除出大量的黄色米糊样异物，终于将难缠的奥美啶取出，术后胸部变软，呈现出自然状态。。
Label: Normal

Outgroup (“them”): the source of harm is framed as the injected substance/medical practice associated with 奥美定 (and implicitly those who administered/used it). Markers: “奥美定并发症”“不定时炸弹”“黄色米糊样异物”“清除病变组织/取出” depict the outgroup as the harmful agent inside the body rather than a social group defined by identity.

iet_response.emotion_inference: anger. The viewer is invited to feel anger toward the harmful agent/practice because it is characterized as dangerous, deceptive/unsafe, and responsible for severe, lingering injury. The “炸弹” metaphor and emphasis on urgent removal heighten threat-based anger rather than disgust alone.

Title: 原来我这么“厌男”啊？天啊！我可太厉害了吧！
Transcript: 。天哪，有人说我艳男哇上了这个扣这么大帽子，不点受不了怎么办？如果说我要是真的艳男的话，就不应该只是现在这样说的这么温和的话，我应该像部分男人对女人那样，看到一盘车厘子，就在意议人家是不是做拉皮条生意的。看到一个女博士呢张口就是哎那我来考考你，不许百度哦。看到一个生活比较富足的女生就要开始意淫人家是不是在做一些不正当的勾当呢？但是呢其实我没有这样哦。我不仅可以欣赏男作者的书，也可以去欣赏男画家的话。甚至呢。一些男性博主讲的比较有道理的一些语言，我也是可以接受的。曲奇精华学习糟粕嘛。相反，由于我生活中受到了不少男性的善意，所以我愿意相信，即便男性和女性拥有差异，还是有一些男生可以尽可能的去了解女生的困境，就算无法做到感同身受，最但也不至于冷眼旁观，不要总是以己夺人哦，小东西。😊
Label: Normal

Title: 使命魔怔哥进击母牛
Transcript: 🎼挑战每天模仿一个角色，今天要模仿的是。魔怔哥母牛版本顾名思义就是在母牛中的魔怔哥。到目前为止，母牛版本的魔证哥是最强的一个，他们会在一个你们都知道的游戏里面打架，他们会在联机大厅里寻找目标，寻找到合适的目标就会直接进去。当他们打掉一个敌人时，那必须把子弹打地上，和别的游戏不同的他们打在地上的子弹，都是100发起步，然后再配上一手硬汉音乐，下面直接看成品，打了就是被打了，不要跟我说什么魔怔不魔怔的，好吧，我这最枪子弹多，我就是喜欢往地上打你能吗我怎么着，哎，我就是打。🎼打他们可能还会这样。呃，今天呢我心情好，放个烟花，没什么问题吧。兄弟们可以看到呢，这个烟花也是非常的漂亮，好吧，有的时候他们还会无聊到练手速，就像这个样子。呃，今天呢也是闲来无聊的练练手速，好吧，不是我说就我这手速，你们敢紧吗？哎，我去，不好意思，不好意思，练手速练过头了，先把花发打掉了，不好意思不好意思呃，不对，不用感谢我不用感谢我啊。😊

Title: 巨婴爱情观
Transcript: 🎼女孩子，如果说你20多岁，你要找一个男孩子，你如果又像人家又有钱，又有事业，又有上进心，还要对你好，那你真的有点作，这叫公主病。凭什么80后也好，90后、95后也好，我们都是独生子女。所以有一个词儿啊叫巨婴，那就是都是心态不成熟的女孩子找对象想找个爸，总想让对方来质疑你，爱你和包容你，这都是不正确的爱情观啊，你只有到了这个年龄，这到了40岁了，你才会去感悟哦。原来我们需要自己变得更好。我们才。还配拥有爱情。如果你自己不够好，或者你每天都是希望对方给你能量，给你信心，给你爱。那这种感情一定是很糟糕的感情，一定是你自己足够好记得出来给别人。
Label: Hateful

iet_response.group_framing: The video positions an implicit ingroup of “mature/healthy” relationship seekers (implied: people who are self-improving, emotionally mature, and age-appropriate in dating expectations). The outgroup is “巨婴/心态不成熟的女孩子” (girls/women with “公主病” or who seek a partner as a “dad” figure, expecting constant validation, love, and tolerance). Markers: labels like “公主病,” “巨婴,” “心态不成熟,” “想找个爸,” and “不正确的爱情观,” contrasted with “80后/90后/95后” who are framed as independent children who should become better rather than demand emotional provision.
iet_response.appraisal_evidence: The outgroup is portrayed as demanding/expecting the partner to provide emotional energy, confidence, love, and tolerance (“总想让对方来质疑你，爱你和包容你”; “每天都是希望对方给你能量，给你信心，给你爱”). The implied harm is relational dysfunction: such expectations lead to “很糟糕的感情” and an “不正确的爱情观.” There is no physical threat, but there is a moral/psychological violation framed as immaturity and entitlement.

Title: 经典台词“贱人就是矫情”！

Title: 杨和苏:“怎么这么娘炮啊？” 呱哥:“我真的无语=_=”

The outgroup is the person being criticized for being “娘炮” (effeminate/“sissy”) and having “绿头发” (green hair), framed as violating the ingroup’s gender/cultural norms. Markers: ingroup = “我哋黄啲” (in-group identity marker) and masculine norm; outgroup = “娘炮”, “绿头发” (gender presentation + appearance markers).

Harm/threat is primarily symbolic/social: the outgroup is treated as making the ingroup feel disgust and as an unacceptable presence rather than a direct physical threat.

Title: 为什么自己的老婆是泼妇？
Transcript: 。🎼为什么自己的老婆像个泼妇，而别人的老婆却那么温柔可爱呢？这个问题其实困扰了很多男人，他们会觉得自己的运气不好，没有找到一个好老婆，或者个人觉得老婆变了。婚前的小鸟一人温柔可爱，都是女人抓出来的吗？现在的他原形毕露了吗？其实眼前的这一切啊都是女人婚后遭到不公的待遇，是女人的一种自我保护，自我反击的一种手段。面对男人的冷漠无情，随意践踏女人尊严的行为，女人别无选择，只有通过唠叨、发脾气来表达自己的。😡不满。
Label: Normal

iet_response.appraisal_evidence: The outgroup (men) is portrayed as being cold and indifferent, acting without care, and “trampling women’s dignity” (践踏女人尊严). The implied harm is emotional/relational harm and disrespect within marriage, leading to women’s anger/complaining as a protective or retaliatory mechanism.

iet_response.action_tendency: None (no explicit collective punishment or attack is endorsed). The video implies understanding/justification of women’s venting (唠叨、发脾气) as self-protection/self-expression rather than advocating harm against men.

Title: 绝经后阴道干涩怎么办
Transcript: 🎼绝经后阴道干涩是什么原因呢？一招帮你恢复，那就是在排除禁忌症的情况下，可以局部使用雌激素软膏。正常人绝经以后，由于雌激素的迅速下降，可以导致阴道的萎缩。黏膜变薄分泌物减少，弹性下降。这时候阴道是会比较干涩的，尤其是在同房的时候没有分泌物的情况下会出现疼痛，在这个期间也容易患上一些老年性阴道炎或者是尿路感染，如果你发生了一些炎症以后，建议你首先对症治疗，局部上药，但。炎症消退以后，可以局部涂一些雌激素软膏，它可以增加局部的激素水平，使阴道粘膜增厚，分泌物增加，提高局部的抵抗力，避免出现一些阴道干涩或者阴道炎的发生。我是朱哥，关注我，帮你解决妇科问题。
Label: Normal

Contraindications are mentioned as something to exclude before using local estrogen, but not as an attack by any group.

The viewer is invited to feel concern/relief and trust in medical guidance: the clinician explains causes and recommends appropriate treatment after ruling out contraindications. Title: 这可是你说的，卖身契拿出来吧
Transcript: 🎼 盼星星盼月亮，盼着深山出太阳，终于把您给盼了了。奇感奇感。您是我是人力资源中心员工关系与企业研化部的副组长马杰啊，以后您就是我的下属的。哎呀，领导，先跟您进行一次薪资谈谈。您现在的职位是专员，职级是K7，按照集团的标准，您给的职位的年薪是数有24万。不是。😊🎼每年15薪加上奖金，各种补助补贴，一年到手大概36万左右。请稍等，我报留给一下兴趣，这只是集团的普通标准。对于您这样重要的人才，我觉得年薪应该上调到最高标准的40万。这还是你说的耐心去麻出。爸，您是指聘用合同对，找卖踏实。😊

Title: 公交车暴躁帅哥和服务员帅哥
Transcript: 🎼相信最近各位都被这两部番刷平了吧。第一步是公交车的暴躁帅哥，男主在公交车上偶遇了一个体育生帅哥，看着帅哥的18块腹肌，他幻想着自己有一天也能锻炼的这么厉害。然而，他羡慕的眼光，被帅哥不小心看到，还以为男主想偷他东西随后，男主就被丢下了公交车，第二步是服务员，服务员替两个客人端上了拿手好菜。然而，两个顾客吃都没吃，就说菜难吃，看到故意找茬的两人服务员并没有生气，而是使用自己的拿手。😡替两个客人重新加工了菜，善良的服务员也迎来了两个客人的一致好评。
Label: Normal

iet_response.group_framing: The video positions an implicit ingroup of 'reasonable/normal people' (e.g., the protagonist and the kind service worker) versus an outgroup of 'troublemakers/people who pick fights' (the athletic guy who misreads the protagonist’s gaze as theft intent, and the two customers who deliberately criticize the food without tasting). Markers: the outgroup is defined behaviorally—accusatory suspicion, intentional fault-finding, and disrespectful treatment—rather than by protected characteristics (no ethnicity/nationality/religion/gender-based grouping).
iet_response.appraisal_evidence: The outgroup is portrayed as violating social fairness and respect toward the ingroup: (1) the athletic guy misinterprets the protagonist’s admiration as theft intent and responds by throwing him off the bus (harm: exclusion/punitive treatment based on suspicion); (2) the two customers refuse to eat and claim the food is bad to create conflict (harm: deliberate provocation and unfair criticism). The implied threat is not physical but reputational/social—being wrongly accused or mistreated.
iet_response.emotion_inference: The viewer is invited to feel anger (and mild contempt) toward the outgroup’s unfair behavior: the suspicion leading to expulsion and the deliberate 'find fault' attitude are framed as unjust. The service worker’s calm competence also contrasts with the outgroup’s hostility, reinforcing anger at the troublemaking rather than fear.
iet_response.action_tendency: The video implies a corrective, non-violent response: the ingroup should respond with composure and constructive action (the service worker reworks the dish to satisfy the customers). It does not endorse attacking or punishing; it endorses resolving the conflict through skill and goodwill.
iet_response.endorsement_stance: Oppose (or at least neutral-to-oppose) any action tendency of punishment/attack. Signals: the service worker does not retaliate emotionally; instead, they improve the food and earn praise. The narrative rewards kindness and problem-solving over retaliation.

Title: 一招阴茎勃起硬如钢男人40如虎狼
Transcript: 🎼 一朝阴金勃起硬如钢，男人4十如虎似郎，你想不想时间达到理想的状态，想不想勃起吃久且有力，这个小方法就能帮助到你。如果你经常有用手的习惯，一直维持到现在硬的快软的快。？🎼房室生活可能两三分钟都不到，硬度不怎么理想，甚至能起步间。有这些问题的朋友不用再担心了。肾气充足，男人的控制能力得到了加强，就能实现自己掌握时间。如果你愿意教我这个医生朋友，可以点一个免费的小红心加关注。只要你是我的粉丝，在评论区打个8，我就把方法辩证发给你一份，请你注意查收。

Transcript: 🎼您是不是想说您所杀者全部都是罪有应得？那么敢问您是如何判定一个人是否罪有应德？您的标准就一定公正吗？双我杀业，我本人是攻打一方，还是罪有应得欲成大事。😡🎼。他们当然不同，伪章。🎼无怪乎此。😊
Label: Normal

The out-group is framed as those who label others as deserving punishment (“they”/“伪章”/the accusers or judges who decide guilt as “罪有应得”). Markers are primarily textual: questions about whether the killed are “罪有应得” and the claim that the other side’s standard is not necessarily fair (“您的标准就一定公正吗？”). No explicit protected-class or ethnicity/race/nationality grouping is used.
iet_response.appraisal_evidence: The out-group is portrayed as making or enforcing an unjust moral/legal determination—deciding that victims are “deserving” without a fair standard (“那么敢问您是如何判定…您的标准就一定公正吗？”). The implied violation is epistemic/moral injustice in judgment (mislabeling guilt and justifying harm). There is no depiction of the out-group attacking the ingroup; rather, the harm is the justification/legitimization of violence through biased judgment.

The emotional tone is adversarial and corrective rather than fearful or disgust-based.

The video does not clearly endorse a collective retaliatory or punitive action; it emphasizes questioning and challenging the legitimacy of the other side’s judgment standards. The implied response is rhetorical/moral contestation rather than an explicit call to attack or punish.
iet_response.endorsement_stance: neutral. The content appears to oppose the out-group’s unjust standard by challenging its fairness, but it does not explicitly endorse a specific retaliatory action tendency. The stance is therefore more about disputing legitimacy than advocating violence.

Title: 《⚡婊 子 配 狗 ⚡》
Transcript: 🎼愤开，你别躲在里面鼓出声，我知道你在听7CB我告诉你你躲在裙子底下做什么？好你要脸的老个狐狸妹竟真然出个个小狐狸的经来，跪下，你什么时候把他变成夫人的？你为为混是场男人，根本就是骗人的。😡🎼大步，你和如萍病了，黄甜天，明你并算总账，原来像上一次那样站别走步嘟嘟跪下你别走，你应该知道什么是妾。嘟嘟跪下，牛不职场男人。这太难了，你和如萍订了婚，他除了毛屎毛叨，你过来个正好，这跟给我跪下，您高贵，好这给我跪下，是超好。😊
Label: Hateful

iet_response.group_framing: The video frames an ingroup of “proper/legitimate” people (implied by references to being a wife/“夫人” and correct social order) versus an outgroup characterized as deceitful/immoral women and their male accomplices (explicitly using derogatory labels in the title and dialogue such as “婊子”, “狐狸精”, and “妾”). Markers: ingroup is associated with legitimacy (wife/“夫人”, “正好/正当”); outgroup is associated with seduction, deception, and illegitimacy (mistress/“妾”, “狐狸精”, “骗人的”, “混是场男人”).
iet_response.appraisal_evidence: The outgroup is portrayed as deceiving and undermining the ingroup’s legitimate relationship/status: they “turn” someone into a wife/“夫人” through manipulation, “mix” with men in a deceptive way, and violate social/moral boundaries (implied sexual/romantic betrayal and coercive social displacement). The harm/threat implied is loss of rightful status and moral contamination of the ingroup’s household order.
iet_response.emotion_inference: anger and contempt (and some disgust) are invited. The dialogue repeatedly accuses the outgroup of deception and sexual/moral wrongdoing (“狐狸精”, “骗人的”, “妾”), and the viewer is positioned to judge them as deserving blame, not empathy.
iet_response.action_tendency: punish / shame. The video repeatedly commands the outgroup to kneel (“跪下”) and frames submission as the appropriate response, indicating a punitive, humiliating collective reaction to restore order.
iet_response.endorsement_stance: endorse. The repeated imperative commands and escalating accusations signal approval of punitive humiliation (kneeling, being confronted, settling accounts) rather than opposition or neutrality.

Title: 大老婆打小老婆，二老婆帮小老婆出气
Transcript: 怎么了？宝宝。😊
Label: Normal

iet_response.group_framing: The video frames an in-group of “wives” within a domestic/relationship hierarchy (e.g., “大老婆/二老婆/小老婆” as internal parties). There is no clear outgroup defined by ethnicity, nationality, religion, or other protected identity. The “them” is effectively the lower-status wife (“小老婆”) being targeted by the higher-status wife (“大老婆”), with “二老婆” positioned as an ally/participant in the conflict. Markers are relational labels (wife ranks) and visible interpersonal aggression/hostility rather than identity-based symbols.
iet_response.appraisal_evidence: The higher-status wife (“大老婆”) is shown physically confronting/striking the lower-status wife (“小老婆”), with additional involvement from another wife (“二老婆”) who appears to help “take revenge” (“出气”). The implied violation is interpersonal harm and dominance enforcement within the relationship, not a threat to group existence. The harm is direct physical aggression and intimidation.
iet_response.emotion_inference: Anger is the primary invited emotion toward the target (“小老婆”) and/or toward the perceived wrongdoing that justifies retaliation. The presence of “revenge/venting” framing (“出气”) and the escalation to physical confrontation encourages anger and a punitive mindset rather than fear/disgust. No disgust or contempt toward a protected outgroup is indicated.
iet_response.action_tendency: Punish (retaliate/discipline) is implied: the video title and on-screen/behavioral cues suggest that the aggressor(s) are justified in “getting even” and that the ally supports the retaliation. This is a collective/relational response within the depicted group hierarchy.
iet_response.endorsement_stance: Endorse. The title explicitly frames the action as “big wife beats little wife, second wife helps vent anger,” and the visual narrative depicts the retaliation as the focal event, signaling approval or normalization of punitive retaliation rather than opposition.
